reviews.name: places/ChIJKWZhkVOJa4cRbrxmEkXwYHo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201cFdGUlRPVTFxZDJreGR6aDBUMjlaU0dwVWEwRRAB
reviews.text: Michelle is very attentive to client’s needs and concerns. She puts in a great deal of effort to get me feeling the best I can! She is also funny, which is a bonus when discussing sensitive matters. I always recommend her to anyone I meet who is having hormone issues. They are all amazing!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJKWZhkVOJa4cRbrxmEkXwYHo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuclpqRUpnEAE
reviews.text: I have been using Happy Hormones MD for 2 years.  I have been very successful improving my health, all due to Michelle!  Being in menopause caused my organs, hormones and blood enzymes to be very low causing many side effects and some too high creating more side effects. I truely believe that Michelle has saved my life with her incredible knowledge of hormone treatments and medical expertise. I don’t want to think how sick I would have been without her treatment plans and exceptional medical care. If you have been thinking about seeking hormone treatment, you won’t regret meeting with Happy Hormones! Please remember your regular doctor or gynecologist do NOT have the medical education for treating hormone replacement. You must see a hormone specialist. Happy Hormones is the most exceptional practice to take care of all your hormone needs.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKWZhkVOJa4cRbrxmEkXwYHo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURubmN2RXFBRRAB
reviews.text: If you think you might have hormone problems, get tested with Michelle! I wish I would have done this 5 years earlier! Not only does Michelle test your hormones, she listens to you and is completely honest on what she thinks will help. She doesn’t pressure you into doing anything and truly wants to help everyone feel their best. The change I’ve experienced has been so positive that my husband even started happy hormones. The staff is also wonderful. Everyone has been very helpful and kind! You definitely should try them!

reviews.name: places/ChIJKWZhkVOJa4cRbrxmEkXwYHo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuMHJ2Wnp3RRAB
reviews.text: My life has transformed since I learned about Michelle and her expertise. Her approach is evidence-based, methodical and empathetic. Her staff are courteous, efficient, professional and personable. Now I have a much better sense of managing my health:  understanding my blood work, how exercise alone cannot compensate for aspects of the aging process, and the benefits of modern medicine to improve the quality of my life. I also enjoy my check up conversations with Michelle—I always leave them with a smile on my face and the sense that I have wisely invested in myself. I am a healthier, happier and even more energetic woman as a result of Happy Hormones.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKWZhkVOJa4cRbrxmEkXwYHo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxdjRLaThRRRAB
reviews.text: Michelle and team have truly changed my health for the better! After learning about how our hormones control so much of our health and well being, I sought out Michelle who is incredibly knowledgeable, listens to your concerns, and gives you options on how you want to proceed in treatment. I am thoroughly impressed at how my plan works for me, and to have access to Michelle for all my health concerns is a huge plus. I feel so much better now at 40 than I ever have before. Thanks to Happy Hormones!

reviews.name: places/ChIJIeEuE5GJbIcRAjQI5-376js/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tvNWFuQXlUVWczVDBSV01HaHllVUUyVW0xR1duYxAB
reviews.text: I have been visiting this location for over six months. Each time I have questions or come for my three-month appointments, the staff is consistently kind and helpful. Additionally, when I experienced a shipment issue, they kindly had me come in for my regular dose, which was greatly appreciated as it allowed me to avoid missing my weekly treatment.

reviews.name: places/ChIJIeEuE5GJbIcRAjQI5-376js/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poR1YxaHZjMHhxTUVRNGMzWTFhV2xyV1U1TVFWRRAB
reviews.text:
Couldn’t be more pleased with my experience with GameDay. It’s been six weeks since my initial visit.

I was quickly and professionally diagnosed with low T and given a prescription tailored to me. Dagny is a gem and deserves a raise.

I chose to do at home injections, but when my supplies were delayed they quickly provided me the option to stop by the office and get what I need free of charge. No waiting. Five minutes in and out again.

I feel like a new man. Everything is better. My sleep has returned to normal. The weights in the gym feel lighter than ever. My recovery is through the roof. And my wife can’t leave me alone. IYKYK.

If you’re on the fence about getting on T, get off and check out by GameDay. You won’t be disappointed.

reviews.name: places/ChIJIeEuE5GJbIcRAjQI5-376js/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tseVNtNHdhRTlSYkdJNWVYWmZZM0Z1ZHpKelZWRRAB
reviews.text: The staff is great. I come in weekly for a Testosterone injection. I am full of energy. At the age of 62 I am able to climb the Manitou Incline, workout at the gym and starting a kettle bell workout. I’m also starting my training for the Colfax 5k and 1/2 marathon. My Quality Of Life and attitude on life have never been better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJIeEuE5GJbIcRAjQI5-376js/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5dGNtUXdTMVl6TWtJelh6VjFWa1ZFZEhOUVNHYxAB
reviews.text: DADS GET TRT FROM GAMEDAY! My dad started taking TRT from GameDay and it has completely changed my entire family dynamic. He shows up better as a dad for his kids, as a husband for my mom, and it has made my family grow closer. I cannot recommend GameDays service enough, it has been revolutionary for my life and I’m not even the one taking TRT. GameDay Aurora offers excellent services, excellent customer support, and excellent people. GO TO GAMEDAY AURORA!

reviews.name: places/ChIJIeEuE5GJbIcRAjQI5-376js/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkNVVUSk9TM0IxUW0xS1ZsZHBaa3BsUms1UWJXYxAB
reviews.text: The team at Gameday is awesome. They make it so easy to get your treatment and always are so welcoming. Come see Dagny and Rob, if you have been on the fence about T. Get up and go and get yourself healthier and more energized for yourself and family!

reviews.name: places/ChIJE_dY8CWIbIcR23nfwPnCpH8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkVlMxSjZSRGh2UlZjdGRYUlBjazFvVDFKRllsRRAB
reviews.text: Where do I begin?  From start to finish, this place has been a nightmare.  Didn't put me on their schedule multiple times, I'd come in and they'd be surprised.  The phlebotomist is very nice but wow, she needs more training.  She poked both hands and both arms for multiple appointments and was only able to successfully draw blood once.  But when I go to another clinic, and they are able to draw blood on the first try.  Communication is severely lacking here as well.  The front desk did not communicate with the provider about my treatment or my follow up appointment.  I tried to give everybody grace and patience because the medical field is tough work, but I have never ever had an experience like this.  I will not be coming back here.

reviews.name: places/ChIJE_dY8CWIbIcR23nfwPnCpH8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20wMFpYZDBNV1JyVm5wVE0xWlpNRzVmY1RWTU1sRRAB
reviews.text:
Everyone is so very friendly. I absolutely love Hamudi. He always remembers my name and other things that we have talked about. He is also very knowledgeable.
I’ve had a lot of success at this place and I would recommend it anyone needing a little help.

reviews.name: places/ChIJE_dY8CWIbIcR23nfwPnCpH8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsNFVtZG5XakpzZFRCQ1V6TlJha1JSVkVOU1MyYxAB
reviews.text: Ever since Hamudi joined Genesis my experience has been amazing. He is incredibly sweet, knowledgeable and patient, and he truly takes the time to make sure you feel comfortable and informed. I’m so thankful to know that if I ever have questions I can reach out to him without any hesitation. He genuinely cares and it shows. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJE_dY8CWIbIcR23nfwPnCpH8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xBMFlTMXhUVnBrVTAweWNrNURNbmRzTFVoTldVRRAB
reviews.text: Aliya is extremely sweet, talkative, and knowledgeable. She made me feel very comfortable obtaining my LipoLean injection and tirzepatide, talking me through all the benefits, options for long-term use, and a comprehensive run down of my body mass. I feel grateful I found Aliya and the Genesis team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJE_dY8CWIbIcR23nfwPnCpH8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oVFF6ZFJVVU52YnpCbGFYTXlZWEJuTkdWTU9GRRAB
reviews.text:
The Genesis staff are nothing short of superheroes in scrubs!

Hamudi—hope I spelled that right—along with the two lovely ladies at the front desk - I wish I had their names-  answered every question I could throw at them. Seriously, they were like a human google, always going above and beyond. They not only explained my lab results with the clarity of a seasoned translator but also helped me explore my options like my own personal shopping assistants for healthcare.

I’ve always had a bit of a phobia when it comes to medication, but these folks were pros at calming my nerves. They educated me on the ins and outs of the medications and even shared tips to help me cope with my anxiety. It felt like a masterclass in how to take my meds for maximum effect.

So, if you’ve never  dealt with any weight loss protocols or medications or feel a bit nervous around doctors' offices…….

**This is the best clinic for you, Go check it out!!! **🩺✨

reviews.text:
I had an exceptional experience at this medical clinic and spa. From the moment I walked in, the environment felt welcoming, professional, and impeccably clean. The front desk staff were friendly and efficient, making the check-in process smooth and comfortable.
What truly sets this clinic apart is the level of care and expertise from the providers. They took the time to thoroughly explain my treatment options, answer all of my questions, and ensure I felt completely confident before moving forward. Their knowledge, attention to detail, and genuine care for patient results really stood out.
The treatment itself was performed with great precision and professionalism, and the results exceeded my expectations. I appreciated how the team focuses on natural, healthy results rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.
It’s clear that this clinic prioritizes patient safety, advanced technology, and high standards of care. I highly recommend this medical spa to anyone looking for a trustworthy, skilled, and welcoming place for aesthetic or wellness treatments. I’m already looking forward to my next visit!

reviews.name: places/ChIJZ7D4NbmHbIcRy5-Bp_yl79k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sak9HSnlibk5pTjNKbGQwWllTM0pzTUVWd2JXYxAB
reviews.text:
I highly recommend Thryve Clinic LLC to anyone looking for professional, personalized healthcare and wellness services. From the moment you walk in, the team makes you feel welcomed, respected, and genuinely cared for. The staff is knowledgeable, compassionate, and truly dedicated to helping patients improve their health and quality of life.

One thing that really stands out about Thryve Clinic LLC is the wide range of services they offer. Their IV Therapy treatments are refreshing and energizing, and the B12 injections are a great boost for energy and overall wellness. If you’re looking to improve your health goals, their weight loss programs are structured, supportive, and effective.

They also provide expert care in migraine management, thyroid management, hormone therapy, and testosterone replacement therapy, ensuring that patients receive treatments tailored to their individual needs. The providers take time to listen carefully, explain treatment options, and develop a plan that truly works for you.

The clinic is clean, professional, and organized, which makes every visit comfortable and stress-free. It’s clear that the entire team is passionate about helping people feel their best and achieve long-term wellness.

If you’re looking for a trusted clinic that focuses on both health and wellness, I strongly recommend Thryve Clinic LLC. Their commitment to patient care and results truly sets them apart.

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Boulder Holistic to anyone looking for a functional medicine doctor. To start, Dr. Terri Fox truly CARES about her patients well being. She’s so attentive to detail and understanding in her approach. Her process for identifying the root cause of my symptoms allowed me to understand WHY I am feeling the way I do.. She tailored a treatment plan that was specific to me and my needs and was overall just an amazing human- being. I am lucky to have found such an amazing functional medicine doctor in Dr. Fox.

Thank you Dr. Fox!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8y4Esi7ta4cR5HJx4s0W56I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21rMVJtSllTSGMwT0VkdFkzUk1RMDlVT1dKRVFrRRAB
reviews.text:
Having relied on quality holistic medical care for over 40 years I have learned a lot about what truly works  -- and what doesn't.
I've been extremely fortunate these last two years ago to be able to find, partner with, and rely on Boulder Holistic Functional Medicine.

Dr. Terri Fox is the best Functional Medicine Doctor I've encountered. By far. Discerning, experienced and doesn't miss an opportunity to pursue what can become optimal health.
She and her team have have both a grounded warmth and professional seriousness -- this practice has integrity, compassion, and excellence.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8y4Esi7ta4cR5HJx4s0W56I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xjMVFXWjViMGcwVEcxWU9WVjFlVmRaVFU1WFZWRRAB
reviews.text: I've been seeing Dr. Reidhead since 2021 and have always had a great experience with her. She saw me through very complex and chronic mold illness. I love that she takes an adaptive, patient-centric approach, always offers alternative solutions, allows me to have an opinion on my own medical care and blends western medicine and functional medicine frameworks as needed. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8y4Esi7ta4cR5HJx4s0W56I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taNlJ6aG9WV2sxZDNORlVtNVFlbWg0WVRGMmMzYxAB
reviews.text:
I am writing this review to protect other patients from having a similar experience with Dr. Terri Fox.

Dr. Fox prescribed me a medication at four times the recommended dose, which caused me to become extremely ill. This excessive dosing was later confirmed by my rheumatologist. After I began experiencing severe side effects, I made repeated attempts to contact her for medical guidance. I did not receive a response for three weeks.

She charges 800 dollars an hour, which should have clued me into what kind of doctor she is. The price is NOT reflective of expertise; it is price gouging the desperate. After she prescribed me this high dose of medication, I desperately tried to get in touch with her for weeks. She offered a 12-minute conversation where Dr. Fox did not give any medical direction; she told me she didn't understand why I was feeling poorly, and I was immediately sent a bill for 200 dollars. I say this to implore you not to choose this clinic if you are dealing with chronic illness; it is, for the most part, a wellness scam. I am currently reporting her to the Colorado Division of Professions and Occupations for medical neglect and abuse.

reviews.text: Dr. Amy helped me resolve an incredibly stubborn case of SIBO, spanning over a year of work together. We began with a number of assessments to understand my specific gut health, and from there she formulated a plan that involved many custom interventions. After each intervention we'd assess my progress, make course corrections, and take breaks for necessary healing periods. Dr. Amy's level of gut-related knowledge is incredible, and I have no doubt that without her specific help I'd still be battling SIBO today. I can't thank her enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_LsDpzua4cRnUTQFhRYRwE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OclpHazJTMFJCVW01Q2FuQkdZVEJKVFRnNGVGRRAB
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough about my experience at Boulder Longevity Institute! I went in fully prepared to spend over $6,000 on exosome therapy, but after meeting with Zach Lueders, PA-C, my entire perspective changed. Zach took the time to really listen, analyze my health history, and explain in detail what was actually happening with my arthritis joint pain and inflammation. His expertise, integrity, and compassion was evident.

Rather than rushing into an expensive treatment, Zach recommended a far more effective, evidence-based plan that not only saves me thousands of dollars but also addresses the root cause of my inflammation and joint degeneration. He thoroughly explained the science behind other regenerative and anti-inflammatory options, helping me understand how to truly support my body’s repair and longevity.

I was blown away by his depth of knowledge and genuine care. It’s rare to find a practitioner who combines cutting-edge regenerative medicine with such honesty and patient-centered focus. He made sure I understood every step, and I left feeling hopeful, empowered, and confident that I’m finally on the right path, without unnecessary expense or hype.

Boulder Longevity Institute is truly at the forefront of functional and regenerative medicine. If you’re considering any advanced therapy — exosomes, longevity medicine, or arthritis treatment — don’t go anywhere else until you’ve met with Boulder Longevity Institute.

Thank you, Zach, Dr. Elizabeth Yurth, and the BLI team for restoring my faith in what exceptional medical care looks like. You’ve earned a lifelong patient and a raving fan!

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_LsDpzua4cRnUTQFhRYRwE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21VdE5WZGlhemRvYzFSQmVHY3RlSEZrZW1SamFYYxAB
reviews.text: After following Dr Yurth on social media for a while and watching her podcasts i know her knowledge in regenerative medicine is amongst the most elite in this area. Also she’s an orthopedic surgeon so this just reinforces how legit this clinic is. I had a telehealth orthopedic regenerative medicine consult today with her PA Zach. Zach’s knowledge was also extremely impressive and the recommendations he provided were cutting edge based on the results they see from their patients. Zach was extremely pleasant and easy to talk to in addition to his high level knowledge. Even though I dont live in colorado I still benefitted extremely from the consult. I encourage anyone looking for guidance on their regenerative medicine health journey to give them a try. You won’t be disappointed!

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_LsDpzua4cRnUTQFhRYRwE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VPbjZsYTdmdmZpU2p3RRAB
reviews.text: If I could give 10 stars I would. I want to thank Dr Yurth and her team, for years they have help guide my mums very complex health journey and I credit Dr Yurth for the fact that is alive today. I cannot say enough about this incredible, compassionate, super knowledgeable doctor. Amazing

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_LsDpzua4cRnUTQFhRYRwE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1dzdQSWN3EAE
reviews.text:
I left my 30 minute intake appointment feeling like this was nothing more than a money grab. I followed up the next day to tell them I would not be moving forward with the $2000+ lab assessment only to be told they were keeping $500 for that 30 minutes. I am glad I walked away when I did.

In follow up to your response. I did not expect to be treated for free. However, I did expect your office to be considerate of the amount of money you expect your clients to pay. An initial suggestion was for me get off my current birth control, something that would, without a doubt, cause significant fluctuations in my hormones. When I asked how I should time that out with my overall hormone assessment, I was told to go forward with the assessment & we could just do another one in 3 months. Off the jump, I was expected to pay nearly $3,000 for each of those assessments. So your office expects $6,000 out of my pocket for hormone assessments, while suggesting things that will cause significant hormone fluctuations. Seems like a never ending cycle of assessments. I stand by my initial feelings of this being a money grab.

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_LsDpzua4cRnUTQFhRYRwE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsaXREb3pRRRAB
reviews.text: I have been a patient of BLI for over a year and the team has been instrumental in helping me personally understand and optimize my health. Early on they even identified a couple of potential health issues using specific biomarkers that if unmanaged could be a concern later in my life. My old primary doc never even discussed or suggested these critical early assessment labs. The regular cadence of insights, support and hospitality I receive from BLI remains an absolute game changer for me and my future self.  I highly recommend BLI if you want to take health care back into your own hands with increased knowledge, healthspan and longevity.  💪

reviews.text:
I’ve seen Deborah once and had a follow up call for hormone and general health support. From running labs not normally run by doctors offices, she discovered where my health is lacking. She’s a trove of information and obviously knows a TON about the woman’s body, hormones and how we can best support our health.

I’ve seen Margaret a couple of times as well for Chinese medicine support and have discovered she’s an acupuncture whisperer.

Now that we have a health plan, I’m looking forward to getting better sleep, more energy, and celebrating being 50 rather than cursing it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJTWWFr6Hua4cRB2LAqXmVhMU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkM2RHOW9iMnBCU1drNU1IVkpPRlJ2VlRSbGVsRRAB
reviews.text:
Helios has been pivotal in my health journey. I was frustrated after years of being told that my symptoms were due to one thing or another by my in-network healthcare providers, their lack of motivation to get to the cause being due to my symptoms only occuring once a year at the beginning, which increased to once a month by the time I sought outside help. Of course, being in my upper 30s, one of the diagnosis was perimenopause without any testing to support it. Even when it was evident that something was wrong with either my liver, gallbladder, or pancreas. Basically, they wanted to wait until my daily life was impacted by my symptoms before putting effort into finding the real cause.

Deborah quickly impressed me with her openness to a variety of causes for my symptoms and testing to really determine what was going on. I felt validated and my issues were finally being addressed. I didn't have to face a future where my health could only get worse.

Beyond the quality care, the entire staff has been attentive and helpful. Helios, along with the Apothecary, has made the healing journey feel attainable. I doubt I have even explored all their offerings yet, but am hopeful they will always be quality. I definitely feel the cost is worth it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJTWWFr6Hua4cRB2LAqXmVhMU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSRmJuWlpVbkZPTm5SR1Z6VkVRMkZQZHpGMlNVRRAB
reviews.text: I love Helios. I enjoy even just going to pick up Supplements because everyone there is so fantastic. Debra Breakell is my nurse practitioner. I love her Integrative Functional medicine approach. I can always count on her to give me sound advice. It complements the western medical model and keeps me healthy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJTWWFr6Hua4cRB2LAqXmVhMU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KVFJEWnpaRTFQYjFGb01pMDVYMjluWWxkU2FuYxAB
reviews.text: Helios is a true gem! I have been working with Dr. B and the Helios team for 4 years. By far and away, Dr. B is the best doctor I’ve ever had. I found him through my own in-depth research looking for someone who could support me and my family in preventative healthcare. He has helped shore us up, per our request as my husband and I are working towards living a long, healthy life. With his support, I have a clearer understanding of what my body needs to thrive in my 40s. The staff at Helios Josh, Marguerite, Autumn and Connor are warm, conscientious, responsive and helpful. And don’t miss petting the sweetest office dog, Dale. Thank you Helios for taking care of me and my family and helping us to optimize our health and increase our capacity.

reviews.name: places/ChIJTWWFr6Hua4cRB2LAqXmVhMU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkUGJFcEplamxvYWw4MU9HWm1WbEZPYkY5RmFFRRAB
reviews.text: Walking into an appointment with Dr Brunschwig isn't what you might get with every doctor. He is relational, relaxed, respectful, and has an awesome ability to listen. His questions are direct, wanting to glean as much information as one is willing to share. He accesses information from his computer and ponders a few minutes both what has been spoken to him, and what he receives from his computer search, which helps in his ability to discern a direction. He discusses his thoughts with you and together you come to a consensus about next steps. You leave feeling as if you have been heard, valued, and knowing he is going to walk and work with you until your situation has been improved! Try him!

reviews.name: places/ChIJUe83Sc7ta4cRPlrI91jPbE8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205R056UXlVR3B4YkRocVptbEtielZYY2s5SE5FRRAB
reviews.text: I met Dr. Kelly Parcell a few years ago as I was navigating menopause symptoms.  She has really helped me optimize my health with HRT and testosterone pellets.  I honestly don't know how I would have done it without her!  Dr. Kelly is incredibly knowledgeable about women's health and I am grateful for her in so many areas of my health.  She also guided me with understanding other important health markers after a thorough review of my bloodwork.  Working with her has really bolstered my confidence and feeling in control of my health as I age.  I highly recommend Dr. Kelly Parcell if you are seeking similar guidance.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUe83Sc7ta4cRPlrI91jPbE8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Ca1NubHhkekZtWW05R2RFSmhOa2RqT1daRVdFRRAB
reviews.text: I have been receiving excellent medical care and advice from Dr. Kelly Parcell since 2017.  I first sought her opinion while in perimenopause:  I was experiencing very negative symptoms that were not being adequately addressed by my primary care physician.  I was interested in knowing what my hormone levels were and any possible remedies that would help during this time of transition.  Dr. Kelly was able to provide access to the necessary lab tests and educate me on a range of possible remedies that were specifically tailored to my body.  Hormone replacement therapy, as well as lifestyle changes, proved to be invaluable to my case.  Over the years, as my body changed, moving inevitably toward full menopause, the remedies changed as well.  I began with oral and transdermal forms of hormone replacement that included estrogen, progesterone, and testosterone.  At a certain point, the transdermal form of testosterone was not being adequately absorbed by my body.  One of the alternatives was a small testosterone pellet that is implanted under the skin in a brief in-office procedure.  I decided to try this form of testosterone and the results were extremely positive.  Symptoms of brain fog, weight gain, chronic fatigue, depression, and low libido were all positively affected.  I began to feel as I had prior to menopause.  The pellets last between 3-4 months and the dose is tailored to my unique needs.  I have been using this form of testosterone since 2019 with no ill effects.  Dr. Kelly closely monitors my health with office visits and comprehensive blood work, which have proved to be invaluable to my understanding of my health and my body.  Moreover, the lab work revealed other conditions that had been missed by my primary care physician since they did not present nor fit the expected patterns.  Armed with this knowledge, I was able to take the necessary steps to reverse these conditions and greatly mitigate a negative outcome.  I highly recommend Dr. Kelly as a very competent and compassionate naturopathic doctor.  She has made a huge difference in my health and happiness.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUe83Sc7ta4cRPlrI91jPbE8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwd1BQOVZnEAE
reviews.text:
Truly amazing clinic with exceptional staff and doctors. Their approach is systematic and efficient. They genuinely care about your whole health. I wish I had been a patient here years ago.

Dr. Clark is an amazing G.I. doctor, she has helped both my daughter and I work through some complicated issues.

Dr. Steve, Dr. Kelly, and Dr. Landry, they are all very supportive and stay on the cutting edge of health research.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUe83Sc7ta4cRPlrI91jPbE8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSZ09xZEZREAE
reviews.text:
I feel so relieved to be under the care of Dr. Clark. For Lyme, mold, viruses, so much more. It took me 40 doctors to find her but I’m so happy to stop looking (for a doctor and a diagnosis) and just focus on healing. The office is wonderful as well.

Dr. Clark is extremely knowledgeable, and has mentored under and trained with the best in the field on Lyme disease. I finally feel like I don’t need to research in all my waking hours. I can trust the process now. Lyme + mold + viruses = a very complicated medical history/patient. I’m thankful to have a doctor who is more than capable and compassionate.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUe83Sc7ta4cRPlrI91jPbE8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5aUppdVBBEAE
reviews.text: I've had opportunity to have consults with various doctors at Naturemed over the years, and every single one of them has been extraordinarily knowledgeable and caring. Our star doctor has been Dr. West, and we can't thank her enough for all she has done for us. We love and admire her so very much. Those working the main desk have also been very attentive, and good at following up when we have questions. Alyssa, the current front-desk person,  represents the peak of efficiency. It's always nice to know that we can count on her. We have had such good results with Integrative Medicine, that we take great pleasure in recommending it as the most complete path to take when faced with health issues and preventive care.

reviews.text:
I’m very grateful for the care I received from Dr. Faulkner.  From the very beginning, he was patient, attentive, and truly listened to my concerns. I never felt rushed during appointments, and he took the time to thoughtfully review my lab results with me and explain everything clearly.

What I appreciated most was the collaborative approach. Instead of a one-size-fits-all plan, we worked together to adjust testing and treatment based on how I was responding. That level of partnership made me feel supported and empowered in my health journey.

Dr. Faulkner is thorough, professional, and genuinely cares about his patients’ well-being. The office staff is super friendly. I highly recommend Dr. Faulkner to anyone looking for a regenerative/ functional provider who listens and works with you as a team.

reviews.text: I had a great experience receiving IV ozone therapy from Dr. Faulkner among other things. He is extremely knowledgeable, kind, and truly cares about his patients. He has gone above and beyond in every way possible- he’s a genuinely good human. I HIGHLY recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJmxUZjNyZbIcRQqd5ZcSN2l8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOUlkxUjRXbVJhTW0xa1ZGWmpUa3hJZUVjNVptYxAB
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about the team at Castle Rock Regenerative Healthcare! Dr. Faulkner actually took the time to listen to my concerns and with full panels helped me figure out what was really going on. We discovered that, even though I’m young, my hormones were completely out of balance. After starting my new medication plan, I’m feeling so much better — my sleep has improved, my mood is more stable, and I just feel more like myself again. The staff is wonderful, supportive, and genuinely cares. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJmxUZjNyZbIcRQqd5ZcSN2l8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2prelV6ZE1UMjlyYUdKS1kwOUlUSGRHVXpCaU0yYxAB
reviews.text: My 28 year old son with Down's Syndrome had a stroke. A week afterwards we had 2 sessions in 3 days in the hyperbaric chamber. The difference these sessions had on his stroke symptoms were profound. After the first session he was walking noticeably better. After the second he was moving his hand and arm in just about full rotation. He was able to put his own hearing aids in and adjust them. After little over 4 weeks and a total of 6 treatments we are only needing to instill some of the strength back into his arm and hand. Cognitively we noticed an immediate reaction in him being more alert, much happier and interactive with people around him. Thank you to Castle Rock Regenerative Healthcare for helping us to achieve these amazing results with my son.

reviews.name: places/ChIJmxUZjNyZbIcRQqd5ZcSN2l8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xabldWWnpOV1pWU1hwM05uaERUbTh0VFdKVmFIYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Scott is fantastic. I started seeing him about a year ago to try something new for my health, and I’m so glad I did. From the beginning, he’s taken the time to really get to know me—not just my health concerns, but me as a person. You never feel rushed or like just another patient here. His whole team is welcoming, professional, and easy to work with.
Before seeing Dr. Scott, I had accepted certain aches and pains—particularly in my knees and back—as just part of getting older. After over 10 years of dealing with those issues, I can honestly say that in a relatively short time, those pains are virtually gone. He has been thorough in collecting data, listening carefully, and recommending treatments that are both curative and preventative.
Beyond addressing long-standing pain, I’ve also noticed a real improvement in my energy, clarity, and overall well-being. The simple, sustainable things he’s introduced into my routine have made a significant difference in my daily life.

reviews.text:
I researched many places and then found Biotwin and it's the only place that didn't seem like an assembly line 'get em in, get their money, get em out' place.  I met with Lori twice before I started and she was extremely patient to address all of my questions, concerns and explain the effects of having no hormones. I started with her in October of 2021 and I have now lost 45 pounds and sleep better and feel better than I have in 10 years!
At my primary care yearly appointment last month my Dr. was so impressed with my lab numbers and my weight loss he wanted to know how I did it so he could recommend Lori to some of his other menopausal patients!
I'm still surprised and so thankful with how well I have done with guidance and help from Lori.

reviews.name: places/ChIJpzGoFe2GbIcRUJbA9xR-L08/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wVllYSnNhemd5UTIxVmVFNVJkelJPZUVrdE5tYxAB
reviews.text:
Lori knows her stuff and she's amazing! I feel so much better!!
I got my life back.

reviews.name: places/ChIJpzGoFe2GbIcRUJbA9xR-L08/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREeXVyN0JBEAE
reviews.text: 10/10 recommended. I found out about Biotwin from a friend, I was suffering from perimenopause symptoms, brain fog, fatigue, heart palpations and weight gain just to name a few. After testing my hormone levels Lori put me on hormone medications that I was deficient in. After about 1 month on hormone replacement therapy WOW, did I see and feel a difference. No more brain fog, more energy, better sleep, better mood. And the best part...I lost 8lbs while building muscle and have kept it off. Yes, it is an investment in yourself but is worth every penny. I recommend Lori to all my friends. I've had such a great experience with Biotwin I just wish I knew about it sooner.

reviews.name: places/ChIJpzGoFe2GbIcRUJbA9xR-L08/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwa3JITjFRRRAB
reviews.text:
I came to Biotwin because I have hormonal issues and had been gaining a lot of weight in the past two years. I had tried many diets, some had worked, but I regained all the weight after a while. Due to health issues I couldn't exercise and I kept gaining weight. I knew something was wrong, but no doctor listened to me.
Lori is fantastic. She listened to me for almost an hour, she understood what was going on and recommended a blood panel to see what was going on. She prescribed the right hormones for me and we agreed that I could try the HGC Diet. I did the long round (40 injections) and lost 21lb. After the maintenance phase I lost another 4lb, so 25lb total!! I'm really happy with the results.
The hormone therapy is helping me maintain my losses and my migraines have been reduced in frequency and potency.
I'm really happy I found Lori and Biotwin.
I totally recommend this clinic.

reviews.name: places/ChIJpzGoFe2GbIcRUJbA9xR-L08/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReUo2RmJnEAE
reviews.text: I started working with Lori Moore back in Sept of 2014. I was lethargic, overweight and nothing I was doing in the gym was helping me reach my goals. The first time I met with Lori she did lab work to help me understand where my levels were. Found out that my vitamin D levels were almost non-existent, cholesterol was off the charts and after talking about my diet I knew the food I was eating wasn't helping me achieve my goals. I learned more from her in the first couple days that she did lab work than I have from working with my primary care physician. In addition her office offered several different ways to help me achieve my health goals. I started B12 injections for energy and Lori helped me understand nutrition as well. The day I went in for my initial consultation Lori asked me what weight I would like to try and achieve. I threw a number out that I had been at before child 3 and 4 were born thinking it would not be achievable. I'm happy to report in 6 months I not only got to my goal weight, I surpassed it! I'm 40 pounds lighter and I have embraced a healthy lifestyle of eating better and being active, so I'm confident I will be able to maintain my weight loss. Would highly recommend Lori Moore. She finally gave me the hope and the guidance I needed to get back on track with losing weight, feeling good and becoming healthy again. It's nice to get your life back! Thanking her for all the support she gave me during this journey!

If you’ve been struggling with hormonal imbalances or just don’t feel like yourself lately, I highly recommend scheduling a consultation. It’s one of the best decisions I’ve made for my health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ13ZQTDKHbIcRPmDvcx6adtU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3d0pxc09REAE

reviews.text:
So Happy to Have Found Harmony Hormone Therapy!

I’m so grateful to have found Harmony Hormone Therapy! I’ve been going there for medical weight loss, and I’m about to start hormone replacement therapy as well. Navigating the changes that come with menopause was challenging, and I really needed some guidance—and Harmony has been exactly what I needed.

Kim has been absolutely amazing from the very start. She took the time to explain everything in detail—how the treatments work, how they can help me reach my goals, and what to expect along the way. What I appreciate most is how she created a personalized plan for me, considering my health history and individual needs. Her thoughtful approach has given me more confidence and clarity in my decisions.

Kim’s professionalism and knowledge have made getting started with both weight loss and hormone therapy so easy. I’ve felt supported throughout the entire process, and it’s reassuring to know I’m in such capable hands.

I’m excited to continue my journey with Harmony Hormone Therapy and highly recommend their services to anyone looking for effective, personalized care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJdSaH2sSBbIcRs2uS0_g0n2I/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2cTdUalpBEAE
reviews.text: I’m healthy, active, and in my late 60’s. Earlier this year I began feeling decreased motivation to do my usual activities. I didn’t feel depressed and had no significant changes in my health or life. I had a history of low vitamin D and B12 levels and wasn’t sure if that was the cause. Kim took time to listen and discuss my history and concerns. I wasn’t sure about hormone therapy, but Kim answered a lot of questions I had and referred me to additional resources to review. She suggested some lab tests that were reasonable in cost. My vitamin D, B12 levels were low, but also some of my thyroid levels. I appreciated how Kim contacted me by both phone and email to review a treatment plan. She explained how the different vitamins and supplements worked together and what dosages work the best. Within a week following her plan I started feeling energetic again. Kim followed up with me periodically and repeated my lab tests to make sure they were moving into optimal ranges. I felt Kim was very knowledgeable on how some simple treatments can make a big difference to help a person feel their very best. She was always professional, easy to reach, and demonstrated excellent communication. I would recommend Kim at Harmony Hormone Therapy to anyone who is interested in exploring ways that they can feel at their very best.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7_jSQQCGbIcRwAzFhCNZmv8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kwNFNFdEZMVVl4ZVRnemVsWjZOMnRaUmxWbVVHYxAB
reviews.text:
My wife had an incredible experience at Trivida Functional Medicine. She originally went in for gut health issues, chronic inflammation, hormone imbalance, poor sleep, mood swings, and elevated cortisol; and the level of care she received was far beyond what we expected.

The team took a true functional medicine approach. They ran comprehensive lab testing to get real answers instead of guessing, and they explained everything clearly so we understood what was going on beneath the surface. Every recommendation was personalized to her specific results. Not a one-size-fits-all protocol!

What really stood out was how communicative and supportive they were. They set up weekly check-ins to keep her accountable and make sure she was progressing. If something wasn’t working or her symptoms shifted in real time, they pivoted quickly and adjusted her care plan. It felt completely collaborative and tailored to her body.

Since starting care, her digestion has improved, inflammation is down, her hormones are more balanced, she’s sleeping better, and her mood is noticeably more stable. The difference in her energy and overall well-being has been huge.

If you’re looking for personalized functional medicine support for gut health, hormone balance, cortisol regulation, inflammation, or sleep issues, I highly recommend Trivida Functional Medicine. They truly care and it shows in the results.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7_jSQQCGbIcRwAzFhCNZmv8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25JMGIyMTFZekZZVVhkS0xYcHdkbHA0V0RRMVIxRRAB
reviews.text: I have been working with Corey, Riley and the Trivida Team for over 2 years.  I cannot say enough great things about the Trivida team.  Every interaction I have had has been top notch, very thorough and professional.  If you are looking for a pill, shot or easy solution......Trivida is not the place for you.  If you are looking at truly understanding your health condition(s), putting together a comprehensive treatment plan and getting to work with the a caring team that will not only explain things to you but really go above and beyond then I highly recommend Trivida.  They have helped me immensely and I can't thank them enough.

reviews.text: Corey and his team at Trivida are the best of the best, and I have been referring to him for years. As a fellow heath care provider, I am extremely selective to whom I refer my patients; I always know Trivida has my patient’s best interest at heart. I have personally seen the amazing results from this practice. If you are looking for a Functional Medicine Practice, look no further.  You will be in great hands.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7_jSQQCGbIcRwAzFhCNZmv8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WbFdHNTVTVFZtTlVwRFZ6bGxhVlZOTjJRNVFtYxAB
reviews.text:
As someone who works in healthcare, I don’t say this lightly the model at Trivida Functional Medicine is how medicine should be practiced. They truly take the time to understand you as a whole person instead of just addressing symptoms and sending you on your way.

There’s real intention behind their testing, recommendations, and follow-up. You’re not just given supplements and left alone… I was supported every step of the way during my program. The level of commitment and communication from the team working to optimize my health was outstanding!!

If you’re ready to actually invest in your long-term health and work with a team that goes above and beyond, I highly recommend them.

If you can avoid risky surgeries with non invasive Stem cell treatment, why not.

reviews.name: places/ChIJp1ycVQOFbIcRSis5tEVWYUw/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6ODhELTZnRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Brandt and the whole team at ThriveMD are amazing! They treat you like family and are warm and welcoming. The treatments I have had at their clinic have drastically improved my quality of life and I recommend them to anyone seeking pain relief.

reviews.name: places/ChIJp1ycVQOFbIcRSis5tEVWYUw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVdTg3ZUZBEAE
reviews.text: Due to the fact that I was making the trip from Canada, I did quite a bit of research before choosing ThriveMD including having a conversation with someone who used the clinic several years ago. I found the stem cell injections to have an immediate impact on reducing pain and inflammation. The condition of my knee is pretty severe and now, a year later, I still have significantly improved mobility and less pain and inflammation. Dr. Brandt really knows his stuff. He and all the staff there are professional and efficient. They make you feel at ease and unstressed. The clinic is spotless and easy to access. The procedure is a little uncomfortable for a few days but relatively painless. If you are having second thoughts about going there, I strongly recommend that you just go. You won't regret it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJp1ycVQOFbIcRSis5tEVWYUw/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacktIUzJRRRAB
reviews.text:
I am 27 and I had a grade 4 chondral defect from a fall that occurred while playing basketball. I was skeptical my knee would ever feel okay, let alone return to sports. Since the stem cell treatment I have returned to basketball, pickle ball, golf and mountain biking. My pain after activity is less as I am further from my surgery. Can’t recommend this enough as a fairly non invasive treatment option for young athletes with cartilage injuries.
Dr. Aaron Boerner PT, DPT

reviews.name: places/ChIJp1ycVQOFbIcRSis5tEVWYUw/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNODlPbmpRRRAB
reviews.text:
Before going to Dr. Brandt and Thrive MD Denver I had two issues that were affecting my quality of life... a slightly torn rotator cuff that would often wake me with discomfort, requiring me to physically use my other arm to re-situate it, and an arthritic thumb that made playing the guitar, (which I did professionally), quite painful.

It was made clear to me that although a stem cell treatment would not CURE these issues, it could reduce the discomfort substantially. I agreed to try, and I've got to say that the procedure was so painless, that afterward I swore they just slapped a band-aid on my hip where they had extracted the cells.

Fast forward a year... I'm back active in martial arts with full use of a shoulder that no longer wakes me, and I can play guitar for hours with no discomfort. Although I had heard stories of how stem cell treatments have produced magical results, I would've never expected this level of comfort.

Knowing that Dr. Brandt is a certified medical doctor was the deal clincher for me, and easily separated him from the pack of other providers. I only hope that stem cell treatments will be available through insurance in the future, as it certainly seems to be a valid option to relieve chronic pain.

Oh, yeah, and Marcie, the front office coordinator, was extremely personable and pro all the way with her attention to detail... providing answers to all my questions and staying in constant communication. In a market that's quickly becoming diluted, Thrive MD Denver is the real deal.

reviews.text: I am so pleased with my treatment here. Today I was sick with respiratory illness. They got me right in, saw the doctor and she saw me, diagnosed me and prescribed meds to make me feel better. I was home by 1:00 and got my meds quickly from RX. Thank you Dr. V and Cami and Stephanie

reviews.name: places/ChIJR8Gp0kxEE4cRyqAapkii0Nc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3dk96UWJREAE
reviews.text:
This is absolutely the most amazing Medical practice I've ever been to!  They only take people over sixty years of age.  My very first appointment was scheduled for two and a half hours!  This is unheard of.  Never have I spent that much time with a primary care person, be that an MD or nurse practitioner.  I went with a dear friend who was seen first so I had a lot of time to watch and listen.  Every patient who walked into that practice was greeted like a good friend or family!  I watched joy, care, and compassion with the front desk staff!!!!?  I walked out of my last practitioner's office because of the following reasons.  I waited ninety minutes because they were behind.  As I walked in I was told that we only had fifteen minutes.  I had only asked two questions, when I started to ask the third I was told we were out of time.  Well I had timed it and only eight minutes had passed.  So I was done with that office.
Yes I drive about 65 miles to Colorado, Springs but it's well worth the trip!  They draw blood at their location and not sure what else they do there but no matter what your needs are they are at the ready to send a referral to meet your needs.  I had Polio as a child and I'm done with going to Doctors, however Age Well has made me enjoy my appointments.  They are easy to find, lots of parking, the art on the walls has all been done by patients.  So if you're looking to make a change give them a try.  Thank you for reading!

reviews.name: places/ChIJR8Gp0kxEE4cRyqAapkii0Nc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiMC12VHdRRRAB
reviews.text: I have been using Age Well Medical Associates since I turned 65, six years ago now and I have been extremely happy with their professionalism, their care and concern, and their availability. As a retired teacher, I’m impressed! This practice is similar to medical care I received while growing up and is getting harder and harder in this new age of medical care. Thanks to all!

reviews.name: places/ChIJR8Gp0kxEE4cRyqAapkii0Nc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMaWNid25BRRAB
reviews.text:
I had such high hopes for this medical practice as it came highly recommended by a friend. My initial nearly 3 hour appointment when I felt very well was informative, and I felt satisfied I had found the doctor for me. I was told that if I'm sick, I could see a doctor within 24 hours. I was told that this medical practice would eliminate going to Urgent Care or the ER. Now I am sick. I called for an appointment Monday. After three conversations with two people giving me the third degree about my symptoms, I was told that Dr  Kulp said to take 2 Tylenol and they hoped I felt better soon. That's it. No appointment. I had been taking Tylenol for a week prior to this and told them that. I managed to get to Urgent Care the next day where I have been treated for a severe sinus infection. I'm still not well, but I'm on the mend, thanks to UC Health Urgent Care.
I'm extremely disappointed in AgeWell, and am unsure whether I can trust them with my medical needs.

reviews.name: places/ChIJR8Gp0kxEE4cRyqAapkii0Nc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMOEs2cGpRRRAB

Vanlandingham at Age Well and really like her a lot. She listens to me and is very helpful in finding what will work or will suggest what methods to use to help me feel better. I highly recommend her.

While we rarely see each other as I’m in LA and they are in Colorado Springs, we still stay in touch. They inspired me to lose 100lbs since I met them in Dec 2023 and my overall health is on the right track. They may not even know it, but they are  exactly where my health and body restoration journey began. Brent/Robin, I love you both. Wishing  you all the best and great health in 2026 and beyond.  —Zia

If anyone wants to make a physical change and improve their health or dealing with injuries, you should certainly reach out to @BioFunctional Health Solutions.  You will be glad you did..and you will feel the same way about them as I do.  Tell ‘em Zia sent you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJV6jSjbNPE4cRl2Qa_AJFjkA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xjMGRqbEJWVmhYV1ZKclVVZExZbTkzTUdGbVIwRRAB
reviews.text:
Thus far I've had a truly great experience with the Colorado Springs location of Castle Rick Hormone Health. I'm just about 2 months into treatment.

After being told by multiple doctors that my hormone levels were "not normal for a woman my age" and then not getting any answers or guidance on how to achieve normal hormone levels, I finally found a doctor and clinic that I trusted with my treatment. I tried various online options but never trusted the people on the other end; just too impersonal. How could they possibly know exactly what I needed if they hadn't had more than a phone conversation with me?

Castle Rock Hormone Health did extensive blood work and met with me multiple times before figuring out a plan that they believed in. The doctor really took his time explaining to me what areas I was abnormal in and broke down the science of their treatment so well! I am now totally educated on not only what my hormone levels are but also on what the treatment is doing to my body and why I need it. I seriously felt, for the first time in my life, like someone understood the science behind my symptoms and empathized with my frustration with the medical industry. The sincerity the entire staff has is just one of the reasons I chose to get treatment with Marco and his team.

I never felt rushed or pressured to use their services. As matter of fact the doctor told to take some time and think about it. He also started me "low and slow" on my dosage, another reason I feel comfortable and chose to get treatment with CRHH.

Also, they offer different injections like B vitamin shots and IV stuff. I love the B vitamins :) And if weightloss is important to you they have a very cool machine that helps track your progress.

I highly recommend Castle Rock Hormone Health. I really do.

reviews.text: Highly highly recommend going here if your trying to see some gains, and increase in things libido, energy and life enjoyment. I was introduced to Marco by my wife and decided to check out what his company had to offer. After getting lab results back I was given a detailed breakdown of my results. We came up with a plan and prescription for my needs. It’s been 30 days and I feel drastic changes, strength, focus, energy, most important is my “cardio game” with my wife has drastically increased.

reviews.name: places/ChIJV6jSjbNPE4cRl2Qa_AJFjkA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VLNjh3dnZKdkluUmp3RRAB
reviews.text:
I'm 41 years old and was struggling mentally, physically, and emotionally. I sought out help from a counselor and was even ready to try psych medication because life was feeling so hard. I didn't work out anymore, hardly had any energy, was very depressed and suicidal at times. my intimacy with my wife was slipping away because of my insecurities due to low libido levels. I kept seeing ads about hormone health, and decided to do a free consultation through castle rock hormone health. What stood out most to me was when I had the opportunity to share my story with Marco and we had so many similarities and struggles. Through this consultation I walked away feeling like this might be the key to helping me get back to a life filled with purpose and normalcy. I also walked away inspired and knowing I had created a new friendship. I appreciated the welcoming environment, and the knowledge the clinicians and doctor were  able to provide. When my Labs came back my test levels were 5 times below what they should be. I noticed significant changes within weeks in my mood, mental health, energy levels, and intimacy with my wife. I'm grateful that I chose to start therapy with castle rock hormone health, and recommend this  to others that struggle with similar symptoms, especially before trying other medications. Thank you castle rock hormone health for being a positive factor in this new me.

JESSE PETERS 41 COLORADO SPRINGS, CO

reviews.text: Denver Regenerative Medicine has helped me with a few different issues with great results.  First, I initially contacted them to get stem cell therapy for my shoulder. I was told by my Orthopedic surgeon that a full shoulder replacement surgery was needed, so instead I reached out to DRM and had them treat me with my own stem cells and PRP.  Several weeks later I was able to move my shoulder without very much pain and with much more motion.  Now, it is almost entirely without pain!  After that treatment, they recommended peptides to help with the healing and improve my overall health.  They gave me BPC-157 to use daily to prevent injuries and to speed recovery and healing.  I didn't know about Peptides before, but I have really had a great result with my shoulder healing and my overall aches and pains.  The staff and doctors here are excellent and very informed.  They will answer all your questions if you reach out to them.  Ty and Dr. Hong are the best!---

reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with GameDay, and I can confidently say it was a five-star experience from beginning to end. The entire process was smooth, well-organized, and genuinely enjoyable, thanks in large part to their incredible staff, Lily, Jess and the male lab tech.

From the first interaction, the team was welcoming, professional, and eager to help. They took the time to answer all my questions thoroughly and made sure I felt comfortable and informed every step of the way. It never felt rushed or transactional—every conversation felt thoughtful and focused on creating the best possible experience. Thanks for the wise of pearls and advice, Jess.

What really stood out was the staff’s attention to detail and commitment to excellence. They anticipated needs before I even had to ask and handled every request with efficiency. It’s clear that they take pride in what they do, and that pride shows in the quality of their service.

The atmosphere they created was energetic, organized, and stress-free. Any adjustments or last-minute changes were managed quickly and professionally, without ever making it feel like an inconvenience. That level of dedication truly sets them apart.

Overall, GameDay exceeded my expectations in every way. Great staff, outstanding service, and an all-around fantastic experience. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone looking for a top-tier experience, and I’m already looking forward to working with them again in the future.

reviews.text:
I was honestly shocked by how good my experience was today.

What originally brought me in was a phone call with Mike. He explained the medical side of things clearly but talked to me like a normal person, not like the typical rushed doctor conversation. That alone made me want to come in.

When I arrived, the place was very clean and well organized. Lily at the front desk was extremely friendly and welcoming and made the whole process easy from the start.

What surprised me most was how much they prioritized me on my first visit. I was not expecting to get results and a clear plan right away. I also sat down with Dave, who took the time to walk me through everything and explain what treatment would make the most sense for my body. Nothing felt rushed or generic.

I left feeling excited and genuinely optimistic. I would recommend Gameday Men’s Health to anyone who wants to take their health seriously and actually feel better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ73LKxuVbE4cRoY6kptNNpbI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3aHVYNVZBEAE
reviews.text:
After receiving an email being asked to leave a review here is my experience. I was contacted by a lady who is less than friendly. She wasn’t welcoming or warming in anyway. She was on a mission to get her job done and get off the phone ASAP. There was no introduction there was no “ Getting to know each other”sadly.
After a 5 to 6 minute conversation She came across as a sales rep. Selling me on all the packages and quoted me $6600. Kindly replied, saying that that was not in my budget at this time. Then it was A mad dash to get off the phone ASAP.
She continue telling me that they offered Even more programs to fit the lower end of peoples budget. When I was able to get a word in edgewise and asked questions, she proceeded to tell me over and over that she was not a doctor and that I needed to book a consultation with a doctor in order to get those questions answered. I wonder why this woman even called me she cannot answer The most basic questions I had. I definitely got off the phone feeling Like I had just dodged a bad car salesman. Obviously, With all the great reviews, maybe she was just having a bad day. However, it was very offputting.
Happy to report I did find a place and I’m happy to start my journey .

reviews.text: The staff is great, but the $105 a month is a lie for at home injections. It’s been 2 weeks since my first shot. The link for my order still hasn’t been sent to have it shipped to my house. Without it you’ll have to go into the center for a shot and pay $56 to $70 dollars for a shot. It’s $135 to start, $56 or $70 dollars without a discount for each shot until your order ships. This is not what they advertise, and seems like a way to make money. I continue to ask them to call the pharmacy and have no answers. If you work a lot and can’t make it into the center for a shot this service will not work for you. Save your money and find another TRT clinic.

reviews.name: places/ChIJu0QMmrRPE4cRzQUogjvHESI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GaVlUWlVRbFEwWkRGT1oyUTRUMVJmY2toNFVIYxAB
reviews.text:
I would strongly advise anyone from choosing this location in order to get your testosterone prescription. I have been going here for about 3-4 years now, and it has pretty much been a constant non-stop headache to get my medication.

They use Village Lane Apothecary. You can google the reviews for this pharmacy, but they are pretty much in the negative. They will literally never get you your medication on time. The pharmacy will  never answer your calls, or ever return your call back number.

MAYBE 1/5th of the time the clinic will actually pick up the phone and attempt to help you, but I have had to drive down to the clinic multiple times just to talk to ANYONE. When I do, they are usually extremely unhelpful and basically tell me to just wait for the pharmacy to get its act together, or pay the clinic for a one week at a time shot.

The Low T Clinic is an overall miserable experience and I would suggest basically going anywhere else.

reviews.name: places/ChIJu0QMmrRPE4cRzQUogjvHESI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQME9UMk5REAE
reviews.text: I was short tempered, having mood swings and every old injury was talking to me. My regular doctor said try a men's clinic. So, I did. They did a surprisingly comprehensive evaluation and recommended treatment. It took a couple of months to get everything dialed in but my quality of life has been massively transformed. Give them a call and ask for Hannah to get you started. She is really compassionate and will make you feel comfortable. The whole staff is great and you really feel like they care about you and your well-being.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVLFXf9FE4cR08R1C1dFPbw/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbEpmRHhnRRAB
reviews.text: Recently, I had been hearing more and more about hormone restoration, and I decided to take a visit to The Hormone Restoration Center in Colorado Springs.  I was approaching 50 and I wanted to learn more about hormone treatments.  I went in for a consultation and blood work.  I was very surprised to find out that I had a thyroid deficiency.  Christine prescribed a thyroid medication and Vitamin D supplements, and this has rocked my world!  I had been feeling very tired and lacked energy.  I could hardly get through a day without taking a nap.  I supposed this was a natural part of aging, but boy, was I wrong.  It was due to my thyroid not working properly.  Now, I wake up ready to go, go, go all day.  At bedtime I get to sleep much faster and I sleep better too.  Another surprise, I was also experiencing joint pain, and that has drastically reduced.  I'm also well on my way to losing the 15 pounds that I had gained over the past two years.  I'm much more productive which makes me feel so much better.  I'm very happy that I went in to the Hormone Restoration Center.  It's been one of the best things that I've done for myself in the last ten years.  Christine Briggs was great, professional and friendly.  I highly recommend Christine and The Hormone Restoration Center.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7Y_Bxt99bIcRtEunUoVotas/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGQ2IwSjJkMnhRVkY5aWNrZFhMVk4zYVVaUE1IYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been dealing with fatigue and mood swings for a long time and couldn’t get any answers from regular doctors. I finally visited this hormone therapy clinic and they took a totally different approach. They ran detailed bloodwork and actually looked at everything—not just one number. Turns out my testosterone was low and out of balance. Started treatment and within a few weeks I felt like a different person. More energy, better focus, even sleeping better. Staff was kind and respectful the whole time. Only downside was the cost—it’s not cheap, especially if your insurance doesn’t cover it—but honestly, it’s worth it. They made me feel like I was finally being taken serious. The doctor checked in often and made small adjustments to get the dose just right. If you feel off and nobody’s giving you answers, give this place a try.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7Y_Bxt99bIcRtEunUoVotas/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4eTYya3lBRRAB

He is very experienced and knowledgeable with hormone treatment and we have never felt better! One always feels welcome there and everyone is friendly.  If you are considering if you need HRT meet with him.  Definitely one of the best health investments we have ever made!

I don’t recommend them. It’s not worth your time or money. When I was told to exercise more and join weight watchers to help maintain my weight. I was done. I exercise regularly and eat very healthy. This was not the issue. Unprofessional!  They are  not willing to listen to patience concerns.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7Y_Bxt99bIcRtEunUoVotas/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRODY3eWl3RRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Lee is amazing! He is highly knowledgeable and obviously knows a lot about hormones. He clearly understands how hormones work in your body and what is needed to effectively treat you based on your individual needs and blood work. He treats the whole person, not just the hormones and symptoms and with a more natural approach. Not only that but he takes the time to really get to know you, answer your questions and explain more than you ever thought you needed to you know about how your hormones work in your body and why he recommends what he does. He even started me on safe and effective weight loss program that doesn’t include any drugs or other crazy diet fads. All with no additional costs or fees added on. I truly feel that Dr. Lee cares about his patients and wants to help people feel better. He was recommended to me by a friend whose whole family is also being cared for by Dr. Lee. I am already feeling better and seeing great results! I am so happy to have found him!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7Y_Bxt99bIcRtEunUoVotas/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2NnNLZklREAE
reviews.text: Don't waste your time or your money, this place is an absolute joke !  They gave me testosterone treatments,  the acne would not go away, then he said split the doses a few times per week, still didn't work, then he gave me antibiotics, still didn't work! They also gave me a ton of supplements, like fish oil that you can get at Natural Grocers for like $15 to $20, they charged me $500-600. and they make you pay a whole year up front (and now I see why probably because nobody would go back after your first appointment, $1800 plus the treatments of test which are $250 every few months! Then on my last visit I went in to try and talk to them why the haven't called me, for an appointment Dr. Lee got in my face got very aggressively with me like he was gonna hit me! Very unprofessional, so I left. They are only after your money people beware! Try other clinics, there are many around that actually care about you, not your wallet! and I did follow the protocols, also to be in business ripping people off for 30 years isn't something to be proud of!! Heis a crook!!!!!

reviews.text: My wife saw Dr Bruice to start.  After just a few short months she felt better, was sleeping through the night again, and was authentically happier each day.  When I was having trouble sleeping and frustrated with my decline as I got closer to 60, I went to meet him.  We did testing and I came back for some therapy.  It's been just over a year and I've dropped about 30 pounds, I've also gained back a lot of my muscle mass, and I'm not tired all the time.  This office for me is life changing!  My regular doctor just told me to accept that my issues were all part of ageing... well, I love anti-ageing.  Thank you Dr Bruice!

reviews.name: places/ChIJlS7OGZF_bIcRQG7U00qijaE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5UFVHWllhMjVYZFcxNlJrUnpZelZDYldsV1YwRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Dr. Bruce. When I first came to see him, I was struggling with a serious hormone deficiency — not premenopause, but something much more unexpected for my age. I was only 44, but I felt like I was 65. I had no energy, I wasn’t sleeping, and I just didn’t feel like myself at all.
I had already seen several doctors before him, spent a lot of time and money, and still didn’t receive the care or answers I needed. From the very first appointment, Dr. Bruce made a difference. His knowledge, compassion, and truly personalized approach completely changed my life.
Thanks to his hormone therapy and care, I now feel like I’m back in my early 30s. My energy has returned, I sleep like a baby, and I feel balanced, clear, and vibrant again. What stands out most is how he tailors treatment to each patient — not a one-size-fits-all solution, but carefully crafted and unique to your individual needs.
I’m incredibly grateful I found Dr. Bruce and have already recommended him to friends. I 100% recommend him to anyone seeking thoughtful, effective, and life-changing hormone care. He is simply amazing!

reviews.name: places/ChIJwTdNv5t-bIcRsyh0Wj96tfI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wVWJTMVNaVFZ3UVVOSFNFdHFWbFJQWWtOd01YYxAB
reviews.text: Although Dr. Bruice was the first Dr who listened to my perimenopause symptoms and offered me treatment- that is where my praise ends. He did not wear gloves when taking my initial bloodwork. He did not explain what exactly I was paying for when I paid the initial 1300$ few. He never did follow up blood work. He asked me if I thought we needed to change the dosage of the hormones he had me on- updated bloodwork would have been a much better way to figure that out. I was told the fee for my hormone pellet procedure After it was done (580$!) - when I had been under the impression it was covered in the initial fee. I recently had a surgery that requires me to do daily lower body physical therapy exercises, and when my PT mentioned that there was a possibility of the pellets becoming dislodged due to the required stationary biking and lower body PT he replied to my email telling me it was impossible. Which is (after speaking with other physicians) simply not true.  He is a one trick pony who gives the same treatment to most of his patients. Save your money and your time- there are many other hormone doctors who will do the proper tests and not stick you with a one size fits all treatment.

reviews.text: If you want to feel better, look no further than Dr. Bruice. He is a doctor who truly cares and truly delivers. Dr. Bruice takes the time to listen, respond, and genuinely care about you. He doesn’t just tell you what to do—he educates you and works with you to create a plan that fits your life. Thanks to his expertise and dedication, I feel better than I have in 20 years!

reviews.text: Dr. Bruice has been amazing. Very detailed and helpful guiding me through these difficult times helping me understand the challenges I face as I have aged.  He takes the time to understand where you are at help you accomplish your goals and see you in the path of feeling and looking better. I highly recommend Dr. Bruice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJwTdNv5t-bIcRsyh0Wj96tfI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaQ2FreFhORTF2UjBaNldrRkVZemMwYm1acVIyYxAB
reviews.text:
Life-changing results—40 pounds lost, renewed vitality!

I’ve been blown away by the results in just nine months under Dr. Bruice’s care. After menopause, my weight skyrocketed—despite no changes in my diet or activity level, I felt like I was losing myself. It wasn’t until Dr. Bruice evaluated and treated my hormonal levels that everything shifted. I’ve lost 40 pounds and feel better than I have in years. I’m truly in the best shape of my life.

What I love about Dr. Bruice is echoed in so many other reviews: he is deeply knowledgeable and incredibly thorough, taking the time to understand your medical history, symptoms, and goals before tailoring a treatment plan. His approach is warm, compassionate, and he always makes you feel heard and valued. He’s also responsive—quick to communicate via email and prompt with lab results and adjustments.

In my case, it was purely hormone therapy that turned things around—no diet overhaul, no new exercise routine—just balancing my hormone levels. Dr. Bruice has truly made a difference in my quality of life, and I can’t recommend him enough. If you’re struggling with hormonal shifts or weight challenges, Dr. Kenton Bruice is the one to call.

Thank you, Dr. Bruice—you’ve changed my life!

reviews.text: Katie is the kindest, most invested Primary Care provider that anyone could ask for. This clinic will care about you and take care of you in a way that very few medical facilities will. reviews.name: places/ChIJr_JmEbx7bIcR3A-mIZa8Gsk/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyb043bk5REAE
reviews.text:
It took one convo, and made the switch!! I recently had the pleasure of migrating my primary care to the Identity clinic, as I kept finding issues with the level of my services and care prior.

I was incredibly impressed by the exceptional care and attention to patient identity, health, and wellbeing that they provide. From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed and respected (which is tough to find in the corporate driven healthcare scene in such a western state).

The Identity team as a whole takes the time to understand each individual's background, preferences, and needs (yes esp. respecting pronouns!) The receptionists are super kind & informed and made the check-in process seamless and stress-free.

During my appointment, my new FNP-C Katie Rudofsky was not only thorough and knowledgeable, but also deeply empathetic to my medical history that extends far beyond even hormonal needs. She asked thoughtful questions and listened attentively, making me feel valued as a person. Her approach significantly dictated my overall experience and confidence in the care I was receiving.

The Identity Clinic as a whole made significant efforts to create an inclusive environment. They offer resources and support for diverse patient identities, including references to competent mental health resources and maintain sensitivity to various gender identities and expressions. The clinic’s commitment to respecting and celebrating individuality is truly TRULY commendable.

Overall, Identity sets a high standard for patient-centered care, with a big emphasis in supporting “who you are” as you go about your life adventure.  (*And no- not just LGBT+, you want to feel respected? Come on in!). Their dedication to supporting and affirming patient identity is unparalleled, and I highly recommend them to anyone seeking a healthcare provider who genuinely cares about their patients' well-being and path in life.

reviews.text: Cannot recommend this clinic enough! I had to run in for a last minute emergency appointment and Katie was so incredibly attentive, thoughtful, and kind. The clinic itself is very clean and welcoming, with complimentary beverages and snacks out in the waiting room. As someone that has always struggled with doctors and medical appointments, for the first time in my life I actually find myself looking forward to coming back. 10/10
