reviews.name: places/ChIJJzaS2999bIcRhjJwnKvelCE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwNlEyRndZbUl0TlRCV2RGbG5iMHhzWkZSa2JHYxAB
reviews.text:
Bad reviews don’t lie guys, went for visit and they introduced this ridiculous package of a subscription plan for drugs.
I say ridiculous because for one its long term commitment, secondly it is extremely expensive upfront and on the long run.
Online companies offer trt for way less money.
Im 35 with somewhat low levels of testosterone but they NEVER mention lifestyle changes or any natural methods to try and raise testosterone naturally, how about encouraging someone to exercise and lift weights? The answer to them is don’t change anything, sign the contract, take the drugs and you will be fixed, I literally felt pressured to sign the subscription contract at the end of the consultation.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJzaS2999bIcRhjJwnKvelCE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaTGFHZzFOV2RFWW1SU1EweFFlVzkxU1haRmVHYxAB
reviews.text: I have been going to Rocky Mountain Men's health Clinic for almost 3 years. They have helped me greatly with HRT and other stuff. The staff here is great. I go to the one down on South Bel Air and the front desk people Emily and Trey are great. And then I can't say enough about Jamie who takes care of all that payments and signing people up . I wasn't quite sure what I could afford or what I was looking for for sure and Jamie went out of her way to help me find a plan that fit me in my budget. I give this place five stars and a few considering hormone replacement therapy I recommend this place 100%. I know I've never felt this good in my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJzaS2999bIcRhjJwnKvelCE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xalRFRjBYMmwwVW1ZM01tRk1SVWRVZVd4bldYYxAB
reviews.text:
I entered into an agreement with RMMC in December 2023 with the understanding I could cancel the program at anytime.  I attempted to cancel starting 2024 and stopped all services.  It was a difficult and long process to get anyone to respond and finally in June 2024, they sent a partial refund to the loan institution.

RMMC would not provide a detailed accounting of services rendered during that 4 month time period, and continues to without the information.

My issue is that in no way did I receive the medications and services they claim that I used and gave refunded the loan company a nominal amount for an agreement of 36 months, and only 4 of those months receiving those services.

I would not trust their word nor would I recommend their services.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJzaS2999bIcRhjJwnKvelCE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GSWVqZEpWRVZGZGxGT2F6TnRRMEZPWDJwaFIyYxAB
reviews.text:
The employees were absolutely rude. Every single one of them as you walk-in and called the office, they treated you like why are you even bothering them?

They would never reach out to you if There is something going on with your order they will not contact you to let you know what’s going on until you call them after you’re waiting for your package and it never shows. A few times they didn’t send my order because they forgot to do bloodwork

Last time I was in & didn’t bother to call me and let me know. Just let me wait for my package until I called. My work schedule time all over the Place so I had a shipped to my house so I didn’t have to go to the office every time and for some reason they kept trying to make me go in every week And I had no choice because I was paying I would go without because I couldn’t make it in,

The only time they start calling me back when I stop paying!!!  Denver Location 1780 S Bellaire St
Denver, CO  80222
United States        don’t recommend !!!!!!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJzaS2999bIcRhjJwnKvelCE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205UVptaEtMVlpzUkdKSWNrcGpTRXBUZG14MFNVRRAB
reviews.text: This place seems expensive and not necessary. They make you pay for a bunch of different meds for 6months- 2 years upfront. Wish I looked at reviews before paying them. They also force you into a bunch of contracts with them so if you don't want the service too bad you're stuck for six months no refund. Just see your primary and go from there. Really predatory practice. If they really cared and were good at what they do they'd not lock you into paying them like that. They also heavily over dosed me according to the FDA and actual doctors. Would not recommend

I see Jen for botox/xeomin and absolutely trust her to put a needle in my face. 😆 I followed her here from another practice because she does such a great job. She knows what's going on with my body, and makes appropriate and helpful recommendations. She is great at her job, and I truly enjoy working with her. She's personable and professional.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXUf0FJt-bIcRPn2He_ecED0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNN1lQUm1RRRAB
reviews.text: My wife and I have been enjoying the benefits of hormone replacement therapy for 5 years now and Denver hormone health is a pleasure to work with. Deb Martin is a pro a reading bloodwork and keeping hormones in balance. Its amazing to see the change that well balanced hormones can have in a person. We saw tremendous improvements in mental health, sex drive and metabolism. The testosterone pellet method allows you to go 4 or more months between visits to the clinic and gives a smooth delivery of the hormone over that time. Nobody needs to let the decline of hormones from aging or other  conditions rob them of quality of life. Its easy, not very expensive and the best kept secret for feeling great over 40. Denver Hormone health should be your first stop for BHRT, Deb and Kristine are great to work with. Deb knows how to get men and women both to the optimum levels of all hormones. The newer method of using bio identical hormones  has made using hormones as we age safer than having low hormones.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlWMHKVeBbIcR70Ur7-M_20g/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KNVltbHJXRmQ1UVdaWVZYZElWVTAwZEhKNWNrRRAB
reviews.text: I needed comprehensive panels done regarding various blood work tests. Denver health has always been very difficult to get an appointment for and the long wait to get in doesn’t work great for someone needing to stay on top of various health markers. I made an appointment with Gameday and they saw me within a couple days. The blood draw was quick and I also set in with their clinician director who went over lots of different options. I felt very well taken care of and like they actually cared about my needs. Yes, going to Denver health is covered through insurance and you do have to pay to have it done here, but I was able to tailor what tests I needed without having to explain why. Overall really great service and plan to continue using them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlWMHKVeBbIcR70Ur7-M_20g/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNyeWFLdm5RRRAB
reviews.text: Picture this, a sports clip for men’s health, professional clean lobby, private rooms for blood tests and consultation. Lovely staff, friendly, they don’t seem to be trying to sell you anything. They teach you how to use injections and go over blood work and results straight to the point but caring for your health. I went in for a blood tests and found my T levels were very low, got on a monthly regime and starting to feel a lot better. There are snacks and drinks and I was overall very happy with the experience. They also offer vitamin shots etc.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlWMHKVeBbIcR70Ur7-M_20g/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSTFFuaHFXRmxuVWtOR2JXcEpOVzR5Wld3MWMwRRAB
reviews.text: I was very impressed with GameDay Englewood. Never had my blood work done and all the employees there were very knowledgeable. Results were fast and easy to understand. No one tried to sell me anything I didn’t need. Definitely recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlWMHKVeBbIcR70Ur7-M_20g/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRM3Z5OXFnRRAB
reviews.text: I had a tremendous experience at Gameday Men's Health in Englewood. Scott, David, and Niva were all very welcoming, knowledgeable, and helpful with answering all my questions, and providing recommendations for improving my areas of concern. The visit was timely and on schedule. Best part is - there was no pressure from anyone at this clinic to buy anything. It was just simply data, questions, and answers. I have gone to other men's clinics over the years, and have always left feeling exhausted from the sales pressure. Here, I received great advice, and walked out of the clinic feeling like I owed them something. Exquisite customer service. Great staff. Thank you Gameday team - keep up the good work!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJlWMHKVeBbIcR70Ur7-M_20g/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmaWJtWWl3RRAB
reviews.text: The staff at Game day has been incredible. I wasn’t sure what to expect when I first checked them out, but honestly, I don’t know what was stopping me now that I’m an existing patient. The whole staff is incredible, easy to communicate with, easy and diligent. I feel better than ever, and my strength training and mental health are markedly improved. If you’re looking for a great clinic, be sure to check them out first. I tried other solutions via social media and e-commerce companies and the white glove, expert care at Game Day is exceptional.

reviews.text:
Castle Rock Hormone Health has been exceptional from start to finish. The team is professional, knowledgeable, and truly invested in helping their patients feel their best. They took the time to understand my goals, explained everything clearly, and made the entire process comfortable and straightforward.

They are incredibly easy to work with, always accommodating, and you can tell they genuinely have your best interest at heart. Unlike many HRT clinics that focus on selling a product or pushing add-ons, they take a thoughtful approach to optimizing your treatment. Their priority is getting your levels dialed in properly—not upselling you.

I’ve noticed a meaningful improvement in my energy, recovery, and overall well-being since starting treatment. Their staff is friendly, responsive, and creates a welcoming environment every visit.

I highly recommend Castle Rock Hormone Health to anyone looking for a personalized, trustworthy, and results-driven approach to hormone therapy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLTIOwJlLaYcRYwkKzPreNWw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GcWExcGhPRWxuUW05VFNUUlVVV3RZTWpjMFNWRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Game Day – Fort Collins. The entire team is excellent—professional, confidential, and incredibly educational. They take the time to explain why they recommend certain approaches, not just what to do, which builds a lot of trust.

What really stands out is that they genuinely care about their business—and it shows in how well they take care of their clients. There’s no pressure, no upselling, just thoughtful guidance and a clear commitment to doing things the right way. You can tell this is an operation built on integrity. The owners are good, honest people, and they’ve created a culture where clients truly come first.

Felicia deserves a special shoutout. She holds so many pieces together and does it effortlessly. She’s knowledgeable, organized, and always a pleasure to talk with—you can feel her positive energy the moment you walk in.

I also really appreciate the addition of their new medical director. If you want a solid one-on-one conversation with someone who truly understands peptides, she’s the person to talk to. She’s sharp, patient, and incredibly accommodating, and she takes the time to listen and tailor recommendations to you—not a cookie-cutter approach.

Overall, this is a team that values relationships, education, and long-term client care. I appreciate every single person there and highly recommend Game Day Fort Collins to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, trustworthy, and welcoming experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLTIOwJlLaYcRYwkKzPreNWw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ocmNFcE1VVE56U21JNGVIZDJibmRaTVRSNGFGRRAB
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and kind staff. The experience was very informative and helpful. The choices that are presented are tailored to you. I signed up on the spot and am looking forward to bettering my health and lifestyle.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLTIOwJlLaYcRYwkKzPreNWw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWNGQwNXFUbU0wVWpCc05reFZVSFJ4WkVoWVMzYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been on TRT pellet therapy for the last four years, and this was my first experience with GameDay — I can honestly say I’m extremely impressed. From the moment I walked in, the team made sure I was completely comfortable before the procedure even started. Everything was handled with professionalism, care, and efficiency.

Jake and his team were absolutely amazing — fast, knowledgeable, and genuinely attentive. If you’re on the fence about trying TRT, I can’t recommend GameDay enough. This was hands-down one of the best medical experiences I’ve had, and I’ll definitely be sticking with them moving forward!

reviews.name: places/ChIJLTIOwJlLaYcRYwkKzPreNWw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWTGJUSTBhV2xZVkU5RlVqUTVhWEJYTjNwUmFFRRAB
reviews.text: All the staff was very friendly and excited to be there. Blood draw was quick and only took 20 minutes to get results.  Very knowledgeable and friendly staff. I Look forward to working with Game Day for the foreseeable future.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLTIOwJlLaYcRYwkKzPreNWw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210RVdsUXdVSFU1WlVSM1ZqQXRhMlpVYWpkMGQyYxAB
reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Gameday Health in Fort Collins enough. Honestly, the experience has been life-changing for me. From the moment I first walked in, I felt like I was in the right place. The entire team—from the front desk to the medical staff—is absolutely the best to work with. They are not only highly professional and knowledgeable, but also incredibly supportive and compassionate.
I've been on their program for a while now, and the results have been nothing short of amazing. The personalized care and attention to detail they provide have made all the difference. They took the time to listen to my concerns, understand my health goals, and create a plan that was perfect for me.
The staff truly makes you feel like a priority. They are always available to answer questions, explain the process, and provide encouragement every step of the way. It’s clear that they are passionate about what they do and genuinely care about their patients' well-being.
If you're looking for a place that will help you feel your best and get your health back on track, look no further than Gameday Health. The combination of their expertise and the incredible staff has made this one of the best decisions I've ever made for myself.

reviews.name: places/ChIJrdqiV4hLaYcRAl0VKsYuTnA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21acWRHUlhUM0J5ZUZWaGRuQnlObGwxWlRZeGJWRRAB
reviews.text:
I was seen a month ago and RMMC confirmed low testosterone by blood tests.
I was prescribed medication and I haven’t felt better in years. Everyone at the clinic was kind and professional.

Does great medical care cost you something?
Absolutely.
Because it’s worth it.

Don’t be dissuaded or discouraged by any negative feedback and comments.
Only YOU, with treatment and advice from a licensed medical practitioner can make any kind of assessment about efficacy, FOR YOU.

I am a month in. It’s early and everyone’s body is different.
But for me, RMMC has already proven to be one of the best choices I’ve ever made for my health and wellbeing.
Thanks to the staff and the clinic

reviews.name: places/ChIJrdqiV4hLaYcRAl0VKsYuTnA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKWGFsY3liMUJLT1ZsMFVFWkdiMmhXVkVWR1EyYxAB
reviews.text: My husband went here due to their rates, which turned out to be a teaser rate, even though they deny this.  They did a lab draw and gave him results but nothing else without a commitment that would end up costing several thousands of dollars per year. Total waste of $99. Be more transparent when booking an appointment so as to not waste time or hard earned money. Plans need to be outlined on the site at minimum. I do realize it will vary per patient but folks should have a general idea.

reviews.name: places/ChIJrdqiV4hLaYcRAl0VKsYuTnA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25rd2J6UnBZalYwYmtOUlpESnVaakpCVUZReU5GRRAB
reviews.text:
Office seemed friendly at first but they were incredibly pushy and don’t accurately take labs. Ask any medical doctor and they’ll give you a look if you mention going here cause they are well known for brushing past stuff to make a sale. Also be prepared for the staff to be rude to you if you try to give them any explanation. They think they know better than every other doctor which seems pretty fishy when every medical doctor and specialist you talk to tells you otherwise. I think a safe first step is to talk to a sex focused Urologist or endocrinologist before you come here.

That said testosterone has its use and value if fertility doesn’t matter to you. It can be good to raise energy levels and boost sex drive if that’s what you need. Just consider other options first.

They’ll try to lump in some LH/FSH protection, but it typically doesn’t do enough to combat the amount of testosterone going in. Also be aware that they’ll refuse to give you any refund if you have to quit prior to the agreement period and won’t even try to work with you. They’ll just argue with you. I get it check the agreements before you sign, but this is more of a just so you know, it’s not worth trying to ask for any refund. Be prepared for them to also push for paying the total up front. (~6k+ in fees)

*Update
They ended up getting the refund sent through. They responded with a generic we help a lot of people which is true, but I still think some of the staff was rude. The nurses and front desk were friendly and helpful. Just be wary of the doctors and sales teams.

reviews.name: places/ChIJrdqiV4hLaYcRAl0VKsYuTnA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWb1NYZzJUamxKTmxWWGFrcE9hazkyZDBsYVJuYxAB
reviews.text: I wish I would have read the comments before I came here. The office was really nice over the phone, but when I got to the office, it was a totally different story. I explained to them about drawing my blood and they did what they wanted and left me in a lot of pain. The dr came in and she was just quick with her words and extremely short. The guy came into go over pricing and he basically told me to take a picture of his computer and was not at all helpful. The pricing was through the roof. I wouldn’t recommend coming here, I think they need to reevaluate the way they treat the people that pay for their doors to be open.

reviews.name: places/ChIJrdqiV4hLaYcRAl0VKsYuTnA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tseVYwaHZTRjlTWlhST1ZXeGlWMmR2U0VObU9FRRAB
reviews.text: This facility is amazing and I recommend it to any men in need of wellness checks. Kat is such a delight when u walk in. She’s always smiling and so kind. reviews.text:
Gameday Men’s Health is an awesome place! The entire team is very professional and friendly from the moment you walk in. I especially appreciate how welcoming and knowledgeable they are when it comes to treating women’s hormone needs as well — that really stood out to me.

Matt is extremely knowledgeable about medicine and takes the time to explain everything clearly, which made me feel comfortable and confident in my care. Jon is a great medical assistant — very smart, attentive, and helpful throughout the process.

The owner Ray and Aixa are some of the kindest people I have met. They truly care about their patients and it shows in the way they run the clinic. Jess at the front desk always welcomes patients with a big smile, which makes every visit feel warm and comfortable.

I truly recommend this place to anyone looking to improve their health and hormone balance. It can genuinely be life-changing!

reviews.text:
Don’t let the name fool you - Gameday Men’s Health is absolutely welcoming to women too! I had my consultation yesterday and the entire team was so kind, professional, and genuinely supportive. From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable and encouraged.

They took the time to answer my questions and made me feel excited and confident about starting my weight loss journey. If you’re a woman who’s been curious but unsure because of the name - go for it! You’ll be so glad you did.

reviews.text: I am so happy to find this place. They have helped me so much with my weight loss. I love the staff.. each and everyone of them are amazing, they treat you like family. I’m very happy with the service everytime I come here.

reviews.name: places/ChIJmaNoKP4DR4cR89cgkMQKkco/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CWlYxaHRYelV3TVd4T09HZEVZVWhGWlVwNVVXYxAB
reviews.text:
I was misled about pricing. I was told TRT would cost about $1,200 per year, but it actually comes out to $2,600. Comparable online clinics (like PeterMD) charge roughly $1,100 annually, and add-ons like hCG are about half the price.

I also experienced serious quality issues with their peptides. When I requested a refund for the second vial and raised concerns about being misquoted on TRT pricing, they refused. Instead, they implied I should be grateful they didn’t charge the $250 cancellation fee for the peptide plan.

In total, I paid $1,200 for just two months of TRT, the smallest hCG option, and a couple of peptide vials. This company is massively overpriced, dishonest about costs, and dismissive when problems arise.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ72aMZOxTaYcRMS5KeRt3Gx8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tka1lUSnVWbk5RVEc4MWJYaE1lV05mU0RadlNWRRAB
reviews.text:
I recently ordered the Needle Guide Assistant (auto injector) from this company and just used it for the first time. I have thought about ordering one for a couple of years, but had continued to self inject my weekly testosterone due to my uncertainty about well this device would actually work. I have always dreaded my weekly shot, but all of that changed a couple of minutes ago. I just experienced my first injection in the right thigh using the Needle Guide Assistant and I am super happy with the outcome. It worked exactly as advertised and was totally pain free.

As info, I carefully read the instructions a couple of times and did a practice run or two before actually using the device for the injection. It’s easy to use, arrived quickly after ordering, was packaged well and in perfect condition. I should have made this purchase years ago.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ72aMZOxTaYcRMS5KeRt3Gx8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CeUxXMVpkMWx5VkRFeGRteENURU5PVUdobFJFRRAB
reviews.text:
Sparks Hormone Therapy has truly been a lifesaver for me. After experiencing a significant crash in my testosterone levels, it began to seriously affect my life and work. Meeting with the staff at Sparks completely changed things for the better. I’m now performing well at work again, and my wife actually enjoys having me around.

Michelle genuinely listens and has been extremely considerate, understanding, and supportive throughout the process. Sparks continues to grow and advance in their services and practices, and it’s clear that this is because of the outstanding staff. Everyone there is a joy to be around—always helpful and welcoming, and they make you feel like you’ve been friends for years.

Thank you to everyone at Sparks for making it possible for me to feel better than my old self again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ72aMZOxTaYcRMS5KeRt3Gx8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xscGVFMUZhVkk0Um0weFNuSnpjVUZVWmxsUVFVRRAB
reviews.text:
Finding Spark has been absolutely life-changing for me!!
I was having most of the classic male low T symptoms and started looking into the possibility of TRT.
I spent a decent amount of time looking into NoCo-area clinics and providers.
I’m beyond grateful that we have a clinic like Spark in our community!!
Lindsey, Sean, and the entire team are world-class providers who are at the forefront of HRT and a wide range of additional health and longevity care options. Their approach to care is very thorough and provides a clear understanding of how HRT works. They also provide very effective care at a great value.
Just 5 months in, and my life has changed dramatically! I no longer feel constantly tired and fatigued.
Energy is phenomenal; I sleep way better, my workouts are more intense, and I have the energy to push myself to perform better! My mood and vitality have improved significantly. I have referred multiple friends to Spark, who have all experienced the same benefits of their care. Working with Spark is one of the absolute best decisions I’ve ever made!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ72aMZOxTaYcRMS5KeRt3Gx8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSM2RERTBWbVV6TTJsU1MzRkZia3BhTlhCYU5VRRAB
reviews.text: I am pleased with my care at Spark Hormone Therapy. In particular, Michelle Hinman is attentive and personable. She’s very experienced and knowledgeable and she willingly answers my questions about concerns with my body. She also does an excellent job explaining blood test results in a clear, understandable way. I felt comfortable, informed, and confident in my care at Spark.

reviews.text: This place is great! The punctuality is second to none, from the meeting in person to the phone calls everything is quick and straightforward. I would highly recommend using them to optimize your performance! My focus has been better and everyday I feel better and better!

reviews.text:
Ageless Men’s is an exceptional healthcare facility because it treats people as whole humans, not just appointments or revenue. From the moment you walk in, there’s a genuine sense of care, comfort, and trust that sets it apart for both men and women.

Kelsea at the front desk truly makes the experience special. She is always helpful, encouraging, and welcoming, and she takes the time to build honest relationships with patients. Her approach never feels transactional—she connects with people in a way that makes you feel seen and supported, which naturally makes you want to return and stay committed to getting your health on track.

The doctor is equally impressive—extremely knowledgeable and intentional about patient care. Instead of focusing only on short-term fixes, they take the time to educate and recommend healthy lifestyle changes that support long-term wellness. It’s clear their goal is not just to help you feel better today, but to help you build a healthier future.

Ageless Men’s isn’t just a clinic—it’s a place of comfort, trust, and community. You’re not treated like a client; you’re treated like family. That level of care and authenticity is why I wouldn’t—and couldn’t—go anywhere else.

I’ve been going to Dr Watt at Cenegenics for a year, and it has been a game changer for me. The evaluations and recommendations are very thorough and detailed. I put in the work.  I do the recommended exercise and nutrition, as well as supplements and prescriptions, and it has improved my health. I’m stronger and have more energy and stamina.  I sleep better.  May be a coincidence, but I also haven’t so much as had a cold the entire time.
If you can afford it, and you’re motivated, I highly recommend giving it a try.

reviews.name: places/ChIJI86Q1GKGbIcRar5Ly75SjR0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyamV5cmRREAE
reviews.text: Cenegenics is absolutely amazing. From the moment I walked in and Michelle greeted me, to the nutritionist to the Doctor everyone was so kind and helpful. I never thought I would find such helpful and amazing people who genuinely cared about my health and wanted to do the right things to help me, such as a diet plan and an exercise plan and extensive research about my own body. Other doctors just give you a pill but these doctors help you by finding what you need not just what the average person needs. I would recommend them to anyone who feels stuck or wants to feel better for the long term. Again absolutely amazing.

reviews.name: places/ChIJI86Q1GKGbIcRar5Ly75SjR0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKcm9ITUZ3EAE
reviews.text: Because of my size and low weight, I always believed I was "healthy". This changed when I had a thorough evaluation with the team at Cenegenics Denver. The combination of lab work, scans, testing and consults revealed that was anything BUT healthy. I sat with a Nutrition and Exercise Counselor, who went above and beyond to review all aspects of what a realistic healthy lifestyle meant and what I would need to do to meet those goals. I then had the pleasure to be seen by Dr. Watt who went through the results of my lab work and scans. He was both thorough and patient with me in explaining everything that I needed to understand to get my health back on track. I am optimistic about my future with Cenegenics and look forward to a long and healthy lifestyle that I can enjoy with my family and new grandchild on the way!

reviews.name: places/ChIJI86Q1GKGbIcRar5Ly75SjR0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWclo2aGZ3EAE
reviews.text:
The staff are welcoming, focused and professional. Over the years I’ve become close to a few of the staff. It’s always a treat to see everyone.
The testing is a long day with incredible information. Dr McCallen is quick, kind and helpful. I’m very happy with Dr McCallen and Cenegenics guiding my heath for a strong body, mind and spirit as I age.

reviews.name: places/ChIJI86Q1GKGbIcRar5Ly75SjR0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjdFluOW5RRRAB
reviews.text: This place is amazing. They make sure you fully understand all of your results and help make a plan to improve your quality of life. reviews.name: places/ChIJ6SQef_CGbIcRJiUgKapcCWA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xSFZtNXRhMGxRV0dkT1FUTm1WMk5YUVVGaFRGRRAB
reviews.text: Almost had blood drawn today by an incompetent phlebotomist. First off, I requested she draw the blood from my left arm because I donate blood and they usually take from my right arm and I was just try to give that arm (veins) a rest. She refused because of time constraints. The main issue and why I feel some retraining needs to be conducted is she wiped my right arm with the alcohol pad and then immediately retouched the area with her gloved finger. Proper protocol is they should not retouch the area with their gloved hand after cleaning it with alcohol. Touching the site again recontaminates it, defeating the purpose of the antiseptic prep. When I said she needs to swab the area because she contaminated it, her response was I have gloves on. The gloves are for your protection. Using the isopropyl alcohol is for my protection. She stormed out of the room claiming I cussed at her, which never happened. Another tech came in and withdrew the blood from my left arm using proper technique.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6SQef_CGbIcRJiUgKapcCWA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oWlpVSmpXWEJUUkdoaFp6RTNTbVU0VERNdFUyYxAB
reviews.text: Idk what to say because at first I was excited and for the first couple months seemed cool but as of late due to miscommunication I now am going a couple weeks without my doses all because I was misinformed about donating blood. Im disappointed by how unprofessional this place is, even when I text about questions that have i keep getting ignored with no reply. I said I didn't feel good after donating blood a second time and they said they'll have the Healthcare person reach out to me and I never heard back.

reviews.text: Highly recommend this location. I've been to a few and this is by far the best. Sarah, B, and DJ are always great! Very efficient, timely, and a clean place. Always look forward to going in as they're always so welcoming. And great results of course!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6SQef_CGbIcRJiUgKapcCWA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xORGQxbEtSWFpJVm05NVgwMWtNak5xTjBOdFVtYxAB
reviews.text: Started shots several months ago. After a while went to self injections. They use another company for the self injection shots. I was resently scheduled to come in for bloodwork. I called and told them I was out of town for that period and they said no problem and we rescheduled for a couple weeks later. A week later I didn't receive the normal package in the mail. I called the office in Greenwood Village and they had no clue what to do. (It's impossible to speak with anyone from the other company who handle the self injections) The center in Greenwood Village was unprofessional,  uncooperative, and shockingly dense. I asked the young girl on the phone to remedy the situation. She said she normally doesn't handle the phones and was just filling in. She eventually got upset and literally hung up on me! I recorded the conversation. I'm filing a complaint with every entity I can think of. This place is run so shabbily they have to be in violation of regulations. So after 5 months of treatment I am left to stop cold turkey. Shocking.

reviews.text:
Doc Ian is, hands-down, one of THE best doctors you will EVER find!  He ALWAYS makes sure that he is THE best at what he does!!  He, personally, trains with cutting edge doctors so that he can provide the most up-to-date technology and services for his patients. reviews.name: places/ChIJXwPuyfiGbIcRaw-rsXO3BgI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsaXNDSlBREAE
reviews.text: I couldn't help but to write a review to share yet another tremendous experience by Doc. Levenson and the team! 4 years ago I truly believe Doc Levenson saved my life as I was sitting in a parking lot not knowing what had overcome me. He immediately responded to my call, diagnosed me with vertigo and got me to the hospital. Well 4 years later Doc Levenson has saved me from surgery. Oct 14th, I tore my meniscus  and everyone told me I would probably need surgery.  Doc Levenson suggested that I go another route and he performed a  PRP treatment. He treated me on October 18th. Here I am less than a month later and I know I made the right decision, first avoiding surgery and secondly being well on my way to recovery. I can't emphasize enough the knowledge and innovation that Doc Levenson has and uses in the medical field. He also is so thorough in my yearly exams that I know I'm living a better life because I see him. Finally Ronda and Ginger are always there to answer questions and keep me in line :)

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwPuyfiGbIcRaw-rsXO3BgI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMweXBDWjdRRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Levenson and his staff are phenomenal! He is a very knowledgeable physician. Whether it comes to primary care, hormone replacement, erectile dysfunction, or aesthetics. reviews.name: places/ChIJXwPuyfiGbIcRaw-rsXO3BgI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbjh6ZldREAE
reviews.text: There is no better doctor in the country. Ian has been my doctor for 20 years. I have moved across the country and have flown back because he is truly the best. His diagnosis and treatment has always been perfect. This is the doctor you can trust your life with. His staff, Ginger and Rhonda go above and beyond to make you feel like family. Ian will always be my doctor and friend. Don't trust your health to anyone else.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXwPuyfiGbIcRaw-rsXO3BgI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrbGRtLUJ3EAE
reviews.text: Dr. Levenson has saved my life 4 times. I have seen many doctors through the years, there is no other doctor like him. Because he is very high in demand and busy, when it is your turn, you have his full attention that includes his incredible knowledge, vast experience, reliable resources and incredible staff.  I wanted to lose some weight because I had been feeling flu like. His keen sense told him that there was more to what I was dealing with. After a series of tests via his referral, I was diagnosed with Gastroparesis. He is now holding my hand through the process of getting treatment for this chronic disorder. Five stars aren’t enough for Dr. Levenson.

reviews.text: Had two referrals to Alpha 1 Perfomance. The best thing I have ever done for myself. Joe and Sarah are knowledgeable, professional and take the time to explain your labs and any recommendations. As an Army Veteran, struggled so much in not just mental heath but physical health. For me with several doctors and therapist along with Joe and Sarah, I’m off all VA medications minus blood pressure. My blood pressure is normalizing, getting my energy back from depression and giving life back to my family. It’s been a decade of trying to understand my health, in a matter of months I’m regaining control of my total health with clinical treatment. Thanks Joe and Sarah for giving me my life back!

reviews.name: places/ChIJy8_FJyyLa4cRNQeRGuCsgHA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWcGVHaHFkRVJvYUdkdlFVTkJNSFpOTlRWaFVYYxAB
reviews.text:
It's been just under three weeks since I first met with Dr. Alison, and my daily lived experience has changed drastically. I have been struggling with debilitating symptoms of mold exposure, CIRS, MCAS, C-PTSD, ADHD, and Asperger's. The chronic inflammation made everything else harder to manage, and I've been panicking at the idea of going back to work when I could barely get through the day without experiencing severe pain. Just a couple weeks after changing some minor things in my diet and implementing most of the supplements she suggested, the inflammation in my body decreased significantly. I can get through my day with more ease than I've experienced in a long time, and my mental and emotional health and stability have leveled out as well despite some extremely stressful circumstances. I have been offered three REALLY exciting job positions, and for the first time in over a year, I feel capable of showing up for them! Dr. Alison's kindness, understanding, and profound expertise has changed my life. She genuinely invested in my well being, and I could feel her care without a doubt. Her faith, kindness, and patience with me and my case has changed the trajectory of my life, and I am so grateful. It probably goes without saying this, but I HIGHLY recommend her. I had seen so many doctors (western and functional), and she went deeper with more care and clarity into my lab results and make up than any of the ones prior. I believe these positive results in my condition will continue and last, and I can see the light of a hopeful future again!
Thank you, doctor! God bless you for all you do!

reviews.name: places/ChIJy8_FJyyLa4cRNQeRGuCsgHA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKbE55MWtiSFJLUVdnMlptNWpURU5qYUdsMGJYYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Alison has been incredible in helping me on my healing journey with gut health and skin issues I’ve struggled with for over 10 years. She’s genuinely attentive and really takes the time to listen and understand what’s going on, not just physically, but in the bigger picture of my life.

I love how she explains things in a way that’s easy to understand and helps me to feel more empowered and confident in prioritizing my health. I really value her thoughtful, down-to-earth approach and her recommendations, which are both realistic and sustainable. Everything throughout this process has felt tailored and doable, and I always leave our appointments feeling supported, understood, and encouraged!

reviews.name: places/ChIJy8_FJyyLa4cRNQeRGuCsgHA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210eGEwczRlRnBKZHpSbGVrVndhMVJqY0VSR2FHYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Egeland has been super helpful in my recovery from mold illness. Her caring demeanor and exceptional presence makes me feel heard, seen and loved. It’s amazing how one human can help us regain hopefulness again. Thanks Doc!

reviews.name: places/ChIJy8_FJyyLa4cRNQeRGuCsgHA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GSlJYRXRiMFpVY0RGMWFGcEpTVXR0U3pKa1pFRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Egeland has been so amazing to work with.  My son changed schools and was getting sick a lot more often than he ever had in the past.  She recommended testing for mold because the new school was the only new variable in his day to day.  She also recommended testing me to make sure that it wasn't coming from our home.  Based on the results, we did determine that he had been exposed to mold from the school and we got him on a detox regimen that was effective yet doable for an 8 year old.  Because we weren't able to take him out of the school the process moved slower but I did see noticeable changes over time that he was getting less fevers and missing school less.  Having this information was so helpful to us because we had a target to treat and weren't just guessing at what was going on.  She made sure all of her recommendations felt manageable and sustainable which allowed us to stick with them over time with our busy schedules.

She also recently helped me with my thyroid and gut problems.  It feels good to know you are addressing the root cause of the problems and not the symptoms.  The great thing about working with Dr. Egeland is not only is she highly experienced and capable from a medical perspective but she is very empathetic and listens to you without feeling rushed.  I never feel like I have to hurry up and get out of her office.

If you have any unanswered medical problems, I highly recommend Dr. Egeland.  She will help you get to the bottom of your issues and create a plan to heal them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJy8_FJyyLa4cRNQeRGuCsgHA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvMHUtSGRnEAE
reviews.text:
Getting help from Dr. Alison Egeland has completely changed my life. When I first found her through a mutual connection, I was in a constant state of fatigue, feeling unwell, and frustrated after trying everything with no results. That was just over six months ago—and now, I no longer have joint pain, I have the energy to be social again, my diet has expanded significantly, and both my skin and gut have improved immensely.

What sets Dr. Egeland apart is how approachable and compassionate she is. She's become a trusted friend and an incredible support system. I’ve never felt this safe, seen, or understood by a doctor before. She meets you exactly where you are—financially, emotionally, and physically. Her support through emails and phone calls has genuinely brought me to tears.

After years of being dismissed by MDs who told me "nothing was wrong," I finally found someone who listens deeply, educates thoroughly, and cares passionately. I was diagnosed with Hashimoto’s hypothyroidism and have lived with chronic stomach issues and body pain for as long as I can remember. Dr. Egeland took the time to explain what might be happening, recommended tests that made sense for my budget, and walked me through every result, answering every single question with patience and clarity.

Because of her, I now feel empowered with knowledge about my body, my gut, and the habits that support true healing. I’m genuinely happier in my body and have a deeper understanding of how to care for it.

If you're feeling lost, overwhelmed, and tired of not being heard—Dr. Egeland will guide you toward understanding the unique needs of your body, not the average. She’s absolutely incredible, and I truly can’t say enough about how much she’s helped me. I am so deeply grateful.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg7qYQgKHa4cRK5uchvAGchQ/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoM3NteEp3EAE
reviews.text:
I have been looking for a doctor like Dr. Payne for a long time. From the moment I met him, I knew I was in excellent hands (his staff is wonderful, too). Dr. Payne took the time to understand my unique health needs and goals and worked with me to develop a personalized treatment plan that included bloodwork, hormone treatments, and weight loss consultation (he even created a custom eating and supplement plan for my husband and me based on our bloodwork!).

One thing I really love about Dr. Payne is his curiosity, open-mindedness, and commitment to ongoing education and research - I feel like I’m receiving the latest and most effective treatments available. He really knows his stuff and takes the time to explain everything to you - he makes you feel like a partner in your own treatment. I have personally benefited from his care (and so has my husband - he started seeing Dr. Payne soon after I did) and am so grateful for the improved quality of life Dr. Payne has helped both of us achieve. Plus he’s really funny. :) I have already referred him to several friends.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Dr. Payne for wellness solutions, he takes the time to look at your complete health and really listens to you. reviews.name: places/ChIJg7qYQgKHa4cRK5uchvAGchQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwNkw3Z2hnRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Payne has been a breath of fresh air. I have had some health issues over the last 8 years and have become very frustrated with the doctors especially when it comes to hormones, blood work and concerns that females specifically have. Most doctors will compare you and your bloodwork to the average population and not listen to your concerns that you may not fall with the bell curve. I actually felt heard by Dr. Payne and have seen positive changes/results. I also want to make note that I felt extremely comfortable in discussing any intimate concerns that unfortunately we get as we age as well. He has been great and I highly recommend him and his office.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlcclIAZ5bIcRHVhgYTJYBns/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25BelltRk1TREZOWDJjMGVWZENYMHh5YXpSSVJrRRAB
reviews.text:
Working with Savannah Young, and the Prime Health team over the past two years has been an incredible experience. I genuinely feel better today than I did before starting care with them, both physically and mentally.

Savannah is extremely relatable and explains things exceptionally well. She takes complex topics and breaks them down in a way that actually makes sense, which made me feel confident and involved in my own health decisions. Nothing ever feels rushed, and every recommendation has a clear purpose behind it.

Since working with Savannah and her team, I’ve been able to truly optimize my health. I’ve competed in multiple HYROX competitions, significantly improved my gut health, and made real progress with anxiety that I struggled with before. I don’t feel like just another number in a system — the care is personal, thoughtful, and tailored to me.

Her team is just as impressive: responsive, organized, and genuinely invested in your progress. From labs to follow-ups, everything runs smoothly and feels well coordinated.

If you’re looking for a provider who truly partners with you and helps you optimize your health long term, I can’t recommend Savannah and her team highly enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlcclIAZ5bIcRHVhgYTJYBns/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WRlRFTmtNRGRzYkROYU9GTlViazFtTUc1M1JsRRAB
reviews.text: I have been working with Savannah and the PrimeHealth team for around 8 months and she has given me my life back! I had been relatively healthy my entire life, but about two years ago began experiencing debilitating gut health issues. I had exhausted all options in the conventional medicine world and every doctor told me I was fine even though I was very fatigued and uncomfortable. When I started working with Savannah, she approached my treatment with deep testing and informed plans based on those. I am happy to report that I am feeling back to my old self thanks to her dedication to my treatment! My only regret is that I didn't find Savannah and PrimeHealth sooner.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlcclIAZ5bIcRHVhgYTJYBns/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xvM2NXOVVabkpIWTNGd1puQmFZM2RqWkhWa2RtYxAB
reviews.text: I would recommend Prime Health and my experience with Abby to anyone! I had such a positive experience getting my health back on track. Everyone in the office is so welcoming and the office is really set up to feel like a comforting place. I can definitely attribute so much of my current wellbeing to the work put in here and it has truly changed my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlcclIAZ5bIcRHVhgYTJYBns/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxWmNsQlpiV3RDYlhoM01Ia3hMWGhCVlV4c04wRRAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been working with Abby at PrimeHealth, and she has been an absolute gift to my health journey. From day one, she approached my concerns with genuine curiosity, deep listening, and a level of expertise that made me feel safe, supported, and truly seen. Abby takes the time to understand the full picture — not just symptoms, but lifestyle, stress, hormones, and overall wellbeing — and her recommendations have been thoughtful, personalized, and incredibly effective.

What I appreciate most is her combination of professionalism and compassion. She never rushes appointments, always makes space for my questions, and explains everything in a clear and empowering way. Since working with Abby, I’ve felt more in control of my health than I have in years.

PrimeHealth is lucky to have her, and I’m so grateful I found my way to her care. I recommend Abby wholeheartedly to anyone looking for a provider who blends functional medicine insight with truly exceptional patient support.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlcclIAZ5bIcRHVhgYTJYBns/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOVGNreEJja1pqTmpod2NrUkVibWw0TldwRlRtYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been dealing with a variety of issues concerning gut health, allergies, chronic pain & fatigue over the last year. I recently did a comprehensive blood panel and went over the results with Savannah Young.

Savannah was incredibly insightful and offered recommendations for nutrition, hydration, exercise, sleep hygiene, stress management, and detoxification to support me to thrive. She also provided a comprehensive summary of our conversation, along with helpful resources & supplementation protocols.

I’m feeling much more optimistic about my overall health after my consultation.

I love the atmosphere within the clinic, it feels so much better on my nervous system than any other medical facilities I’ve experienced.

I also really appreciate that Prime Health occasionally hosts weekend workshops / classes. I have attended a breathwork event at Prime Health which was really restorative for my nervous system.

I highly recommend checking out Prime Health if you’re seeking a more holistic, functional approach to your health & overall wellbeing and prefer practitioners who genuinely desire to support you to thrive.

💚💙💜

reviews.text: They are extremely helpful and super responsive, and ever since I started using them My health has definitely improved for the better from getting my hormones right to taking peotode which have made me feel like I’m back in my 20s. Taylor is a great team member and been working with her for over 3 years now. Highly recommend this place!

reviews.name: places/ChIJewXgR96Da4cRKnEnLVZ84bw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xscGRtUkhNV2hpTFU1ZlNEUmpWREJyVFRNeVptYxAB
reviews.text: After losing my dad Feb 2022, I made a promise to him and myself to make changes for me and live life to the fullest and be the best version of me that I could be. It’s been a 4 year journey. After 3 years of pushing and pushing plateau for 18 months. I knew my body was fighting me and I needed help as I’m 45 years old. I talked to Taylor and Amanda. They put me in touch with the doctor and we got to the root of the problem. My T levels were low. I still had labido and had no issues there however it wasn’t enough for my body to pull me out of being over weight. I started TRT in Dec 2024. By March of 2025, my mom before she passed would say MATT you look amazing that shirt is great on you.  It was only a true classic shirt. Nothing special. What she didn’t know was my muscle increased and my body fat was going down. Fast forward to today. I have a 4 pack abs and I’m not done. What I tell people is that I will NEVER NOT be on TRT. this will be my life and I recommend anyone who has a healthy prostate to consider this. It changed my life. My job is easier. People are nicer, people are respectful, I can take my shirt off in the pool and not feel like I’m blinding people. I wake up and want to exercise. I naturally don’t feel the urge to drink cause I love the results more. It’s my own choice but I love it. Call Taylor and call Amanda. They actually do this cause they love it. It’s not just a job it’s their passion. Tap in and take advantage of it today!!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJewXgR96Da4cRKnEnLVZ84bw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2bmR2eVJBEAE
reviews.text:
Extremely Disappointed with Care and Service at Rejuvenate U

While my initial experience at Rejuvenate U was positive, it quickly deteriorated. The responsiveness that I appreciated at first turned into long delays and a lack of follow-up. After a few months, it felt like I was just another number rather than a valued patient.

When I decided to seek care at a new clinic that offered more affordable services, I encountered major issues retrieving my medical records. I contacted my physician but was redirected to the front desk. The representative apologized for my previous experience and promised to send my documents, but they never arrived.

After two weeks of waiting, I followed up and was told that some of my records were no longer on file, which was shocking and unacceptable. The idea that medical records could just disappear is incredibly unprofessional. The front desk hesitated to assist further, and my attempts to reach out again resulted in unanswered voicemails.

It’s clear that Rejuvenate U prioritizes profits over patient care. I strongly advise anyone considering this clinic to look elsewhere. There are many clinics that offer the same services at a fraction of the cost and with far better customer service. Be prepared for frustration if you choose to go here, especially regarding your medical documents..

reviews.name: places/ChIJewXgR96Da4cRKnEnLVZ84bw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2eDdTUkN3EAE
reviews.text: The folks at Rejuvenate U are the absolute best. I had a consultation phone call with someone with new client intake and explained the entire process. Once I had gone through my goals and what I intended to get out of Rejuvenate U's hundreds of option, they tailored a plan for me based upon my results from various tests conducted. It was seamless and everything was done quickly and timely. After a just one month on the plan, I feel amazing! I highly recommend RejuvenateU and the team.

reviews.text:
Update:
I've been a patient here for several months and am so thankful to have a found owners and caregivers that genuinely care and are so supportive and knowledgeable.
Great people.
Great care. Thank you!

After being in their offices, hearing about their care team's total commitment to patient health and patient experience, I can't imagine having any better care or experience for a hormone health journey.
The offices are clean, easy to get to, easy parking and I was welcomed by the owners in the most genuine and supportive way.
Really great people!!!
Update:
Their care AND KNOWLEDGE about proper and healthy hormone optimization has been TOTALLY refreshing! Having spoken to many health care providers in the space, their's is the first team that I've come across that has a deep and clear understanding of the holistic nature of treating the "whole person" and not just prescribing a synthetic hormone.
Hormone optimization therapy is a complex and detailed balance and they have shown a true understanding and caring about doing right.
I'm my experience, most General Practitioner (GPs) physicians have not done the depth of training needed to holistically support a balanced hormonal system.
Sincere thank you CRHH Littleton!

Within a few weeks, I noticed a significant improvement in my energy levels, mood, sleep quality, and overall well-being. I finally feel like myself again! The follow-up care has been just as impressive — consistent, attentive, and genuinely caring.
If you’re struggling with symptoms related to hormonal imbalance, I highly recommend exploring ColoradoTRT. It has truly made a life-changing difference for me.

reviews.name: places/ChIJE9ZWKyeBbIcRbSCIoE5vfdw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twQlR5MDRUbGwyWlRWVmFXdEJVMDFGVVdnelVXYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve had an excellent experience with Colorado TRT. I originally went to them looking for real answers to my hormone imbalances and ongoing perimenopause symptoms, and the care I’ve received has truly been life-changing.

Since starting treatment, I’ve seen drastic improvements across the board — my cholesterol is down, A1C has dropped,  my blood pressure has improved, my sleep quality is better, my sex drive is back, and for the first time in years I’m experiencing weight loss along with a noticeable improvement in my metabolism.

My health is honestly better than it has been in over a decade. The team is knowledgeable, attentive, and focused on treating the whole person, not just lab numbers. I’m incredibly grateful for the support and results I’ve had and highly recommend Colorado TRT to anyone struggling with hormone-related issues, especially during perimenopause.

reviews.name: places/ChIJnQn4EqiFbIcR0Qc6nB-subk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWMll6Wm9NbEJ3ZEVrMFNrUnBTMFEwV0ZJeGFVRRAB
reviews.text:
Hormone health has been a God send to me in my life.  I was introduced to them by my sister who lives in Tennessee.   I started with Hormone health in 2007.
I had had a total hysterectomy in 1989.  I had been without any Hormone therapy up to 2007.  My life changed once I was on Hormone therapy every three months.  At first, I started the therapy in Nashville Tennessee.   I had to fly there every three months because the clinic in Lonetree, Colorado had not opened yet.  I was so thankful when their office opened in Lonetree.  Dr Debbie Arabia has been wonderful in keeping my hormones at levels that keep me healthy.  All of the staff there has treated me wonderful.  I encourage anyone having hormonal problems to make an appointment to see Doctor  Arabia to be evaluated.  You won't be sorry.
I am a happy with my care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJX9HAk2Pza4cR5JmoL7BTh50/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aWlJsVlROa2h5TVdSSmQyOVNhbWx6U3pkNFpYYxAB
reviews.text:
Life-Changing Experience at Eliv8MD The Best Decision I’ve Ever Made!
From the moment I walked in, I knew this place was different. The staff is incredibly warm, professional, and genuinely invested in your success. Everyone – from the front desk to the providers – takes the time to listen, explain everything clearly, and make you feel like you’re their only patient.
I came in frustrated with stubborn weight gain, low energy, and the feeling that I was just “aging too fast.” After a thorough consultation and in-house lab work (no running around town to different labs – huge bonus!), they created a personalized hormone optimization and peptide plan that has completely transformed how I feel.
In just a few months:
•  I’ve lost weight
•  My energy is through the roof – I’m finally waking up refreshed
•  Libido, mood, sleep, and mental clarity are all better than they’ve been in years
•  Muscle tone is coming back faster than I thought possible
What sets this center apart is that everything truly is under one roof: consultation, blood draws, peptide therapy, hormone replacement, follow-up labs, and even body-composition monitoring. No waiting weeks for results or bouncing between offices. The process is seamless, and the results speak for themselves.
If you’re on the fence about hormone therapy, peptides, or medical weight loss, do yourself a favor and book a consultation here. This isn’t a cookie-cutter “med spa” – it’s legitimate, science-backed care delivered by people who actually care. I wish I had done this years ago!
Thank you to the entire team – you’ve given me my confidence and vitality back! 💪❤️

Rich

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9f4B9Zvua4cRu31vhnXY2Hg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1a1dtSmFVakJPVGxodWJIUkpTWGwzTVdvek1rRRAB
reviews.text:
As someone relatively new to the area, finding the right healthcare provider felt overwhelming so I feel incredibly grateful to have found Dr. Crane and the team at Kaufman Hormone & Health.

Dr. Crane truly listens and pays close attention to details. She carefully reviewed my labs and hormones and took the time to explain what everything meant in a way that felt empowering rather than rushed. What really stood out, though, was her recommendation for a GI mapping test and personalized protocol. The changes we made had a huge impact on my gut health. I genuinely feel better in ways I hadn’t even realized I could.

The entire staff is warm, friendly, and welcoming. You never feel like just another appointment on the schedule. And while they’re thorough and in demand, it hasn’t been extremely difficult to get in (though part of me wants to keep this place a secret because they’re that good!).

If you’re looking for thoughtful, root-cause care with a team that truly supports you, I can’t recommend Dr. Crane and Kaufman Hormone & Health enough.

reviews.text: I have known Dr. Ginger Wolfe for over a decade, and she has treated me for years. If you're searching for a practitioner who truly listens, investigates deeply, and treats the root cause (not just symptoms), look no further than Dr. Ginger Wolfe. From the moment you meet her, you feel seen, heard and genuinely cared for. Dr. Wolfe is not just a functional medicine expert-she's a health detective, a compassionate healer, and a fierce advocate for her patients' well-being. Her approach is refreshingly thorough. She uses advanced diagnostic testing, takes time to understand your full health history, and crafts personalized protocols that actually work. Whether you're struggling with hormone imbalances, autoimmune conditions or GI issues, she brings clarity where others fall short. What sets her apart is her relentless pursuit of answers. She doesn't guess, she tests. I have never felt rushed or dismissed in working with her. It's almost like you're a partner with her in your healing journey. If you're ready to take control of your health and finally get the answers you deserve, call Dr. Ginger Wolfe. She's not just a Dr, she's a game-changer.

reviews.text: Dr Ginger and Abbie at Wolfe Functional Medicine has completely changed how I look at my health. Instead of rushing through appointments, they took the time to listen, explain, and create a plan tailored just for me. I finally feel like someone is looking at the whole picture, not just quick fixes. The improvements I’ve seen in my energy and overall wellness are incredible. I’m so thankful I found them! Worth every penny for the level of care and results I’ve received.” More than 5 stars!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM8vHZGTua4cRHwGutIsJv34/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kb1RUaDBTMjVSWDBSeFNsQXpMVkl4U3pGMmExRRAB
reviews.text: I have struggled with autoimmune disorders and Chronic health issues, basically my entire life. I started experiencing a new set of symptoms back in December and saw 4 different doctors – primary care, emergency, allergy, dermatologist. When all of them told me that I would have to deal with chronic full body hives potentially for the next 15 years or for life I was basically at my wits end when I decided to come to Dr. Wolfe. I started going there in February and at the time I was taking 4 Zyrtec a day just to keep the hives at bay. I was also dealing with swelling in my hands and feet and face. As it is now, August, I can confidently say that I do not struggle with hives nearly to the degree I was struggling with them before. If I ever get hives, it’s one or two and they’re few and far between and we are still in the process of treatment. I can finally wear my wedding ring again as my hands have stopped swelling. I am able to function in a way that I was not able to before. If I knew that this office would help me so much I would’ve started this journey so long ago!! I feel like it’s only uphill from here.

reviews.name: places/ChIJM8vHZGTua4cRHwGutIsJv34/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrdnJ5YzBBRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Wolfe is the best functional medicine doctor I have ever met. I have gone to dozens and dozens of doctors and she was the only was to properly diagnose me. She is incredibly smart, kind and caring. She truly cares about getting you health and always has your best interest at heart. I have never met a doctor as thorough or dedicated as Dr. Wolfe. I am so grateful for having met her, I would recommend her to anyone in need of a functional medicine doctor, or chiropractor. Her staff is amazing and always makes you feel welcome. You will not be disappointed.

reviews.text: I was recommended by a family friend and they were so kind once I walked in. Gave lots of information.  They did not pressure me into signing up for anything. I loved they did a payment plan with me so I could lose my weight an be happy again with myself. Woman are welcome here!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJPQmQSPZ3bIcRtxEbRp3tzC0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kblRERklSbEp2VEhoeWFYbHZhVzB5Um1KZloyYxAB
reviews.text: I came into Game Day feeling a bit nervous about discussing men’s health issues, but Jonie and her staff immediately put me at ease. The lab work was handled like a pro—honestly, the easiest blood draw I’ve ever had. When my results came back, they didn’t try to upsell me on things my body didn’t need. Instead, they took the time to dig deeper into the real reasons I’ve been feeling sluggish, unmotivated, and unfocused. You can tell Jonie and her team genuinely care. When you’re more than just a paycheck to them, it shows—they truly want to see you operating at your best. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJPQmQSPZ3bIcRtxEbRp3tzC0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21odFFqZGtSVmxoY2xKT1FrSk9YMFZSZVVsMk1tYxAB
reviews.text: Simply WOW! I wish I had found Dr. Parker years ago. The care and attention to detail that this clinic provides is 10/10 absolutely astounding! If you have struggled with any health issues just know that you are in great hands with GameDay Men’s Health. I can’t recommend them enough to any guy, for everything from testosterone therapies to weight loss. This place truly makes sure their clients receive they help they need for a better life!

reviews.name: places/ChIJPQmQSPZ3bIcRtxEbRp3tzC0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxbVdGWmxUemQ2TURsWE1XMUdiMmRUUjBwYWNHYxAB
reviews.text:
This place is fantastic. I have been now on Threapy for almost 20 years. Recently I had to change where I was receiving treatment.

I can’t tell you how nice it is to find a place like this. Just a little back round on me.  I have worked both as a group fitness, instructor, personal trainer and have gone to school for the fitness field.

I don’t know everything by far however, I have run into several places that try to make it seem like they have knowledge in the field of nutrition and male hormone and told me things that I knew were untrue in order for what I believe to sell me a product and get me out the door. Sometimes I felt like I was on an assembly machine. lol

Everybody in the office was very friendly very knowledgeable about their job. But even do their best to know everybody by first name. Which there is gonna be not too many places still out there that actually care enough to even know your name let alone remember it. And they take their time to explain everything to you. You don’t feel rushed. You also don’t feel like they are trying to sell you products as I did not feel pushed at all. Just informed.

If you’re looking for hormone therapy in and around the Thornton area, this is the place to go. I guarantee you you will be very happy In choosing this place for your hormone or wellness  treatments.

reviews.name: places/ChIJPQmQSPZ3bIcRtxEbRp3tzC0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wNVJFcGhZWGxCVVRWRWRVMXVPSFZoTkdsV0xYYxAB
reviews.text: Stopped by Gameday Men’s Health recently and was really impressed. The clinic is clean, I was greeted by the franchise owner and medical director upon entering, and they made the whole process really comfortable. Everything was explained clearly, and you can tell they genuinely care about their patients. Highly recommend if your looking for a clinic that actually listens!

reviews.name: places/ChIJPa7X_ykfeEkRGDr-JATXptM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsUlVrUndhbXhpZEdoTGJHTnlhWGxpTlU5MmJtYxAB
reviews.text:
Since my very first experience of setting my first appointment, to now months later following their advice, I have been well cared for by Apex Hormone Health, specifically Jennifer Lucero.

I waited way too long to begin hormone replacement due to the negative press from unknowing medical institutions that didn't understand the nuances and safety of the treatments. Finding out that hormones were not only safe to use, but having many other benefits to women and men's health in general.

I'm so glad and optimistic for the future after listening to a good friend lead the way for me to start my journey. Then finding Apex.

Jennifer is highly knowledgeable, thorough, careful and kind, I can't say enough to anyone who has thought about their hormone health and has waited far too long to address it. What a blessing that I am well on my way, I'm feeling better everyday and for the foreseeable future.

reviews.name: places/ChIJPa7X_ykfeEkRGDr-JATXptM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ocmNFdFhRbWRLV1ZsUFRVUXlSV0pXT1c5bU0yYxAB
reviews.text: Jennifer at Apex hormone health is amazing! As a pelvic floor physical therapist, I refer so many of my patients to see her. She is a wealth of knowledge and takes it upon herself to continue educating herself on best practices. I highly recommend seeing Jennifer if you were dealing with hormone concerns, weight loss, concerns, peri/menopausal concerns, or just want to feel better in your body. You won't regret it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJPa7X_ykfeEkRGDr-JATXptM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsb2JFTlpVbWs0T0d0V1gxVkdTWEJLYkdacVdtYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about my experience with Jennifer at Apex Hormone Health. She has been an absolute game-changer in helping me manage my menopause symptoms and stubborn weight gain. Jennifer is incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and thorough—she truly takes the time to listen and understand what you’re going through.

She walked me step-by-step through a gut and liver detox and helped me start an elimination diet tailored to my needs. Her follow-up and support have been outstanding. I’m gradually seeing results, and for the first time in a long while, I feel hopeful and empowered about my health. I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for compassionate, expert support on their wellness journey.

reviews.name: places/ChIJPa7X_ykfeEkRGDr-JATXptM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201MVRtNTBjMlZoWmtzdGRsbE9URGg2WW01a1YzYxAB
reviews.text: Went through peptide therapy in Parker, CO and am currently going through hormone therapy. This is and has been such a fantastic experience. The hormone therapy has been life-changing, I feel alive - full of energy, driven, full of life. The peptide therapy resulted in a complete body recomposition that I thought impossible. This was of course coupled with strict dietary intake and workout regimen but I could not have asked for a better experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJPa7X_ykfeEkRGDr-JATXptM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvd3ZXR29RRRAB
reviews.text: This is definitely a gem of a find. Jennifer at Apex Hormone Health is incredible. She is kind, patient, and, most importantly, thorough. I came to her for concerns of low T, and I did plenty of research regarding testosterone replacement therapy for men my age (35). The entire experience from start to finish was seamless and, honestly, a pleasure. If you're in the Parker, Colorado area, then I highly recommend Jennifer and her business. One of the best experiences I have had in a long time at a wellness clinic.

reviews.text: I switched CRHH after a year and a half of care under a different provider. What a difference!  The staff is incredible, working as a cohesive team to provide comprehensive care. This is the A Team and I feel completely confident in the care provided as a direct result of their combined medical experience, empathy based approach to patient care, and excellent communication.  I’m very grateful to have found this team and look forward to working with them for years to come.

reviews.text: Castle Rock Hormone Health (Parker location) is absolutely amazing! The entire team has been incredible to work with—friendly, attentive, and genuinely caring every step of the way. I have more energy, better mood, and just an overall sense of well-being I hadn’t felt in years. I can’t say enough good things about this place—highly recommend to anyone struggling with hormone imbalance or just wanting to feel their best.

reviews.name: places/ChIJFwe7pjSjE4cRXgMTGIMJX1M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxNVNFOXVXWFpGZUdnd1RYZHhNWE13T1VWamNuYxAB
reviews.text:
Exceptional Care and Expertise - Highly Recommend!
I cannot say enough positive things about my experience with Jeremiah Velasquez at Steel City HRT. From my very first appointment, Jeremiah demonstrated an incredible level of professionalism, knowledge, and genuine care for my well-being.
What truly sets Jeremiah apart is his ability to listen attentively and take the time to understand my individual health goals. He thoroughly explained my treatment options, answered all of my questions with patience, and made sure I felt completely comfortable and informed throughout the entire process.
The level of expertise Jeremiah brings to hormone replacement therapy is evident in every interaction. He stays current with the latest research and approaches treatment with both science-based protocols and personalized attention. I've seen remarkable improvements in my energy levels, overall health, and quality of life since beginning treatment.
Beyond his clinical skills, Jeremiah creates a welcoming and judgment-free environment. He's responsive to concerns, follows up consistently, and truly invests in his patients' success. It's rare to find a healthcare provider who combines such deep knowledge with genuine compassion.
If you're considering HRT and want someone who will partner with you on your health journey, I cannot recommend Jeremiah Velasquez and Steel City HRT highly enough. Five stars doesn't feel like enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFwe7pjSjE4cRXgMTGIMJX1M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoNWQwbDNNVzFVWkd4T1NFdDJNemh2UWpOUmNuYxAB
reviews.text: Just wanted to get in here and let you guys know about how great Steel City TRT is. Im a 55yo male, super active and I just felt a little sluggish. I did some research and went in to see Jeremiah. We did some blood work, I met in person to discuss my goals and he recommended a regimen that would get me where I wanted to be. Jeremiah knows his stuff. He available anytime, he will answer any questions you may have on TRT. Im on my 6th week and I feel awesome!!! I should have started earlier. My workouts are better I recovery faster and my libido is up there...😉 check out Steel City TRT, you wont regret it. AND it's affordable.

reviews.name: places/ChIJFwe7pjSjE4cRXgMTGIMJX1M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxc05WSnRZbFV6TUc1dlVrdDRUSFprYTBnNGVsRRAB
reviews.text: Jeremiah is very helpful. He explains everything very through. He listens to what you want to achieve out of TRT and concerns I would recommend him to anyone. Response time is great from him or his assistant. Will continue going to Steel City HRT and weight loss. Great people!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFwe7pjSjE4cRXgMTGIMJX1M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOWWNqRlVSamRCVEdnMk9VZFdVVFpLWWxkTlZtYxAB
reviews.text: Receiving care through Steel City HRT is straightforward and easy. I was able to express my needs and received my prescription in the same week and began treatment immediately. Staff is consistent, thorough, and responsive. Whenever I have questions, I reach out and receive a response within the hour, if not within minutes. I'm very happy with this place!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFwe7pjSjE4cRXgMTGIMJX1M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wbFpVaEpZa1F3YkZOTk5IaEtjRE0yVVdKSmJXYxAB
reviews.text:
I started with Steel City HRT & Weightloss in January, and I want people to understand one thing upfront: HRT is a process. You don’t magically feel better overnight. It takes time, patience, and a few adjustments to find the exact dose your body needs.

I’m 39 and had spent years feeling exhausted, dismissed, and told I was “too young” for HRT. When my testosterone came back at 9, everything finally made sense. Jeremiah took the time to listen, explain, and truly involve me in my care, which is something I never experienced in traditional medicine.

Now, I have more energy, my mood and anxiety have improved dramatically, and I’m finally shedding stubborn weight. I feel mentally and emotionally dialed in for the first time in years.

If you’re considering HRT, know that it takes commitment, but it is absolutely worth it. I’m so grateful I took the chance. Steel City HRT has been life-changing.
