reviews.name: places/ChIJMXVCNhd1bIcRUbhY50BDqsw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0dGIzcG5VVWR4VVU1SWFXMHpXVWc0UmtoSmJuYxAB
reviews.text:
Ageless Men’s Clinic in Westminster is outstanding. From the moment I walked in, I felt the team’s professionalism and dedication. They don’t just provide services — they take the time to understand your needs and deliver a truly personal touch.

I really appreciated their flexibility and how they customized everything to ensure the best results. The outcome was absolutely perfect, and I couldn’t be happier.

Huge thanks to Erica, Shannon, and Taylor — your care, expertise, and attention to detail made all the difference. Highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for top‑tier service with a personal feel!

reviews.name: places/ChIJMXVCNhd1bIcRUbhY50BDqsw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tZd01XSkVlRWQ2VkMxR2RWRmpOekJrYkhSRVdYYxAB
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I couldn’t be more satisfied with my experience at Ageless Men’s Health! Every visit is marked by exceptional professionalism and a welcoming atmosphere. The quality of their services and products is truly top-tier — you can tell they are committed to helping their clients feel and perform their best.

What really sets Ageless Men’s Health apart is their outstanding customer service. Erica, Shannon and the entire team go above and beyond to make sure every patient feels valued, informed, and cared for. Their consistency, attentiveness, and genuine concern make every appointment a great experience.

I highly recommend anyone considering their services to come and check out Ageless Men’s Health. You won’t be disappointed — they’ve absolutely earned all five stars!

reviews.name: places/ChIJMXVCNhd1bIcRUbhY50BDqsw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kwemJWSlphSGREYWt4NmRHZDZNbFJGY1VoWFJXYxAB
reviews.text: Gameday Men's Health in Boulder, is a God Send!! Easy to find,.ample parking. The staff is knowledgeable, kind and warm. After turning 40, the body just isn't what it was 20 years ago. I am so grateful for all of the alternative options and direction they offer. Longevity is key and Gameday Men's Health completely gets it!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJMXVCNhd1bIcRUbhY50BDqsw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2treE0xbFFkamh6UVZNNU5FY3dOMDgzU1daSFIyYxAB
reviews.text: Best place to go if you’re feeling sluggish or just not feeling like you used to.  The staff are amazing and they are so patient and helpful in finding the right treatments that will be best for you.  They were frequently checking my stats along the way so I could see my progress and if anything needed to be tweaked they talked me through it and let me decide what direction to go.  Great staff, and great environment. If your looking for testosterone treatment or wanting to lose some weight, this is the best place to go, no gimmicks, no pressure, all around best place I’ve been too get my treatments.

reviews.name: places/ChIJMXVCNhd1bIcRUbhY50BDqsw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKU2RtaERiMk10V0U5aU9IUldSSGhYYlZocmNYYxAB
reviews.text: The providers all are amazing!!!!! They are caring and gentle. They take the time to fully understand your needs and provided excellent service. The products they use are effective. The customer service and reminders are friendly, non-intrusive and efficient.  I hope to be a long time patient.

reviews.name: places/ChIJj0G2Ab91bIcRSire6FYp4KE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkQ2JHSmFXV2M1TmpGWFIyaFVOM1l5WkVwdkxXYxAB
reviews.text: Completely changed my life! After going to Rocky Mountain mens clinic and was treated like I was buying a used Pontiac, I went to Low T center, first off they accept insurance, of course if you meet the Insurance carrier required levels (after taking 2 blood tests). After seeing my levels they got me started for about $ 150 bucks cheaper than quoted by the other guys and I pay as I  go!! Insurance kicked in the 3rd week and I pay $0 (In office) They are very professional and I never expected to feel so much better in 6weeks! Thank you so much!

reviews.name: places/ChIJj0G2Ab91bIcRSire6FYp4KE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poQ1dYbG9TSEpFYm10RWRWZENlbk5OU0RrdFZFRRAB
reviews.text: Its not the T Center im having problems with. Its their supplier Village Lane Apothecary. Lousy customer service and shipment reliability. If it doesnt improve like yesterday ill be looking for another vendor. Beware.

reviews.name: places/ChIJj0G2Ab91bIcRSire6FYp4KE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWelQzQlJTMmQ2TjFsT2FuRnNYMWt0Y1hjMFNrRRAB
reviews.text: When first started there everything was good, a couple weeks after starting had a really bad allergic reaction to the type of testosterone and cellulitis occurred. One of the Dr on site said it would be ok to start new type of testosterone. I thought that was odd considering how bad my leg was. Went and had a second opinion and was told I could not take shots for 6-8 weeks. Finally got that cleared up started taken the new testosterone, that was grape seed oil. The shipment took two weeks. I received and took the first months doses then they require labs and bloodwork and a Dr consultation. Went there payed all the money for all of it and never even heard back from the office or a consultation from the Dr for my lab work or how to get my next shipment. I tell everybody to go somewhere else now.

reviews.name: places/ChIJj0G2Ab91bIcRSire6FYp4KE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210alFYSlhjMlpEYlRJMlRYRkhPVzlVZUZvMFZGRRAB
reviews.text: I have been going there for 5 years now always been professional and very happy with the results I have had.

reviews.name: places/ChIJj0G2Ab91bIcRSire6FYp4KE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfaXBMamRBEAE
reviews.text: The team at Low T Center truly goes above and beyond to make you feel like family rather than just a patient. From the moment you walk in, their genuine care and professionalism shine through. They take the time to listen, explain, and ensure you’re comfortable throughout the entire process. If you’re on the fence about checking it out, don’t hesitate—just do it. You won’t regret it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJLUFzXyJ1bIcRVjMNPdIi1Eo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oRlgyOUNNVWxmYzFoMlRtTkNMVTFFZWt0SVRHYxAB
reviews.text: I have been a patient at Rocky Mountain Men’s Clinic for over 3 months now. I have been very impressed with the quality of their care and service. One person I would single out for special recognition is Maria. She runs the front desk and is the first person you meet when entering the clinic. She is always pleasant and business like. I really have  appreciated her flexibility in finding alternate appointment dates and times when work changes my schedule. Maria does a great job and is an excellent employee to have greeting patients and representing RMMC to new and veteran patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLUFzXyJ1bIcRVjMNPdIi1Eo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoSVpFb3phbVpLTUVoa1Jrc3dZVEptVm5seE1IYxAB
reviews.text: Been going to this location 1-2 times a week since April of last year and haven't had a bad experience. All the staff is professional, caring and friendly. Maria is the nicest person ever and has always remembered my name when I walk in the door and welcomes me in with a smile. It feels like I know many of the staff on a more personal and friendly level which makes appointments much easier to go to than if I was walking into a stiff clinic that just wants to get you in and out as quickly as possible. Discussing sensitive issues has been easy here and I have never felt judged which is crucial to ensuring you get the correct treatments you need. Nearly a year of visits and I would absolutely recommend this location to anyone who has been on the fence of seeking care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLUFzXyJ1bIcRVjMNPdIi1Eo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoalpGbE5jbWhvZVRBNFNVaERjbWgxVVRkc1NWRRAB
reviews.text: Rocky Mountain Men’s Clinic deserves a full five-star review. From the moment you walk in, the reception staff make you feel genuinely welcome — warm, friendly, and professional without being rushed or clinical. They create a relaxed, comfortable atmosphere that immediately puts you at ease, which makes a huge difference. The entire experience feels well organised and respectful, and you’re treated like a person, not just an appointment. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this clinic to anyone looking for excellent service and a truly welcoming front-of-house team.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLUFzXyJ1bIcRVjMNPdIi1Eo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWdWRtWjVNRTF3T0hwdFdrOWpjRkJ3Y0VsS2NHYxAB
reviews.text: I love this place. It has helped me immensely. And their front desk woman Maria is just the best. Always cheerful and smiling. Very professional and quick to get me checked in and placed in a room that gets me in and out in under 10 minutes. Thanks Maria, keep up the great work.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLUFzXyJ1bIcRVjMNPdIi1Eo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pVeFh6TTNTV1p1VG5SNmJqVmlUSE5YVUVwQmJuYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been visiting this place for about six months now, and the process is just perfect! I have a hectic work schedule, but I can always swing by whenever I need to. There’s never a wait, and I’m in and out in no time. Vicky did my draw today, and she was fantastic—so friendly and helpful. I’d definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for HRT.
